#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/inventory/components/inventory-table/inventory-table.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/inventory/components/inventory-table/inventory-table.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+import { Component, inject, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatTableModule } from '@angular/material/table';
+
+import { InventoryProduct, InventoryTableData } from '../../../../core/models/inventory-product.model';
+import { MockInventoryService } from '../../../../core/services/mock-inventory.service';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-inventory-table',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatButtonModule, MatCardModule, MatIconModule, MatTableModule],
+  templateUrl: './inventory-table.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './inventory-table.component.scss'
+})
+export class InventoryTableComponent {
+  private readonly mockInventoryService = inject(MockInventoryService);
+
+  readonly block = input.required<InventoryTableData>();
+  readonly placeholderImageUrl = 'https://placehold.co/96x96/f0f2f4/5c6670?text=YCC';
+  readonly displayedColumns: Array<'image' | 'id' | 'name' | 'category' | 'stock' | 'actions'> = [
+    'image',
+    'id',
+    'name',
+    'category',
+    'stock',
+    'actions'
+  ];
+
+  addStock(productId: number): void {
+    this.mockInventoryService.addStock(productId);
+  }
+
+  removeStock(productId: number): void {
+    this.mockInventoryService.removeStock(productId);
+  }
+
+  labelFor(column: (typeof this.displayedColumns)[number]): string {
+    return this.block().columns.find((item) => item.key === column)?.label ?? column;
+  }
+
+  imageFor(product: InventoryProduct): string {
+    return product.imageUrl || this.placeholderImageUrl;
+  }
+
+  stockLabel(product: InventoryProduct): string {
+    return product.stock === 0 ? 'Sin stock' : String(product.stock);
+  }
+
+  stockTone(product: InventoryProduct): 'empty' | 'low' | 'healthy' {
+    if (product.stock === 0) {
+      return 'empty';
+    }
+
+    if (product.stock <= 3) {
+      return 'low';
+    }
+
+    return 'healthy';
+  }
+
+  hasStock(product: InventoryProduct): boolean {
+    return product.stock > 0;
+  }
+
+  onImageError(event: Event): void {
+    const element = event.target;
+
+    if (element instanceof HTMLImageElement && element.src !== this.placeholderImageUrl) {
+      element.src = this.placeholderImageUrl;
+    }
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/create-template-dialog/create-template-dialog.component.html`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/create-template-dialog/create-template-dialog.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+<h2 mat-dialog-title>Crear template</h2>
+
+<mat-dialog-content>
+  @if (materials$ | async; as materials) {
+    <form class="create-template-dialog__form" [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="submit()">
+      <section class="create-template-dialog__intro">
+        <p class="create-template-dialog__intro-title">Definición base de tarea reutilizable</p>
+        <p class="create-template-dialog__intro-copy">
+          Configurá la base operativa del trabajo con su descripción, subtareas y materiales requeridos para reutilizarla en futuras tareas.
+        </p>
+      </section>
+
+      <div class="create-template-dialog__fields">
+        <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+          <mat-label>Título</mat-label>
+          <input matInput formControlName="title" placeholder="Ej. Instalación estándar de router y cableado" />
+          @if (form.controls.title.hasError('required') && form.controls.title.touched) {
+            <mat-error>El título es obligatorio.</mat-error>
+          }
+        </mat-form-field>
+
+        <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic" class="create-template-dialog__description-field">
+          <mat-label>Descripción</mat-label>
+          <textarea matInput rows="4" formControlName="description" placeholder="Describí el alcance operativo del template"></textarea>
+          @if (form.controls.description.hasError('required') && form.controls.description.touched) {
+            <mat-error>La descripción es obligatoria.</mat-error>
+          }
+        </mat-form-field>
+      </div>
+
+      <section class="create-template-dialog__section">
+        <app-template-subtasks-editor [subtasks]="subtasks" [buildSubtask]="subtaskFactory" />
+
+        @if (subtasks.hasError('required') && subtasks.touched) {
+          <p class="create-template-dialog__section-error">Agregá al menos una subtarea al template.</p>
+        }
+      </section>
+
+      <section class="create-template-dialog__section">
+        <app-template-materials-editor [requiredMaterials]="requiredMaterials" [materials]="materials" />
+      </section>
+
+      <mat-dialog-actions align="end">
+        <button mat-button type="button" mat-dialog-close>Cancelar</button>
+        <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="submit">Guardar template</button>
+      </mat-dialog-actions>
+    </form>
+  }
+</mat-dialog-content>
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/create-template-dialog/create-template-dialog.component.scss`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/create-template-dialog/create-template-dialog.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+:host {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__form {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.15rem;
+  min-width: min(100%, 64rem);
+  padding-top: 0.25rem;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__intro {
+  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.05), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94));
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__intro-title,
+.create-template-dialog__intro-copy,
+.create-template-dialog__section-error {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__intro-title {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__intro-copy {
+  margin-top: 0.3rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  line-height: 1.55;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__fields {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__description-field {
+  grid-column: 1 / -1;
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__section {
+  padding: 1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1.15rem;
+  background: rgba(250, 250, 251, 0.96);
+}
+
+.create-template-dialog__section-error {
+  margin-top: 0.75rem;
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+mat-dialog-content {
+  max-height: min(78dvh, 56rem);
+  padding-top: 0.25rem;
+}
+
+mat-dialog-actions {
+  padding: 0;
+  margin-top: 0.1rem;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 900px) {
+  .create-template-dialog__form {
+    min-width: 0;
+  }
+
+  .create-template-dialog__fields {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .create-template-dialog__description-field {
+    grid-column: auto;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import { FormArray, FormControl, FormGroup } from '@angular/forms';
+
+export interface TemplateSubtaskFormModel {
+  id: FormControl<string>;
+  title: FormControl<string>;
+  children: FormArray<TemplateSubtaskFormGroup>;
+}
+
+export type TemplateSubtaskFormGroup = FormGroup<TemplateSubtaskFormModel>;
+
+export interface TemplateRequiredMaterialFormModel {
+  materialId: FormControl<number | string>;
+  name: FormControl<string>;
+  quantity: FormControl<number>;
+  unit: FormControl<string>;
+}
+
+export type TemplateRequiredMaterialFormGroup = FormGroup<TemplateRequiredMaterialFormModel>;
+
+export interface CreateTemplateFormModel {
+  title: FormControl<string>;
+  description: FormControl<string>;
+  subtasks: FormArray<TemplateSubtaskFormGroup>;
+  requiredMaterials: FormArray<TemplateRequiredMaterialFormGroup>;
+}
+
+export type CreateTemplateFormGroup = FormGroup<CreateTemplateFormModel>;
```

```diff
+<section class="template-materials-editor">
+  <div class="template-materials-editor__header">
+    <div>
+      <p class="template-materials-editor__title">Materiales requeridos</p>
+      <p class="template-materials-editor__subtitle">Definí los insumos necesarios para ejecutar este template y dejar preparada la referencia operativa.</p>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+

+            @if (material.unit) {
+              <span class="template-materials-editor__unit-hint">({{ material.unit }})</span>
+            }
+          </mat-option>

+      </mat-select>
+      @if (addMaterialForm.controls.materialId.hasError('required') && addMaterialForm.controls.materialId.touched) {

+

+
```

```diff
+.template-materials-editor {

+.template-materials-editor__empty {

+}
```

```diff
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>

+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/template-materials-editor/template-materials-editor.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+import { Component, inject, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { FormArray, FormBuilder, ReactiveFormsModule, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+import { MatSelectModule } from '@angular/material/select';
+
+import { MaterialOption } from '../../../../core/models/material.model';
+import { TemplateRequiredMaterialFormGroup } from '../task-template-form.types';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-template-materials-editor',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    MatButtonModule,
+    MatFormFieldModule,
+    MatIconModule,
+    MatInputModule,
+    MatSelectModule,
+    ReactiveFormsModule
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './template-materials-editor.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './template-materials-editor.component.scss'
+})
+export class TemplateMaterialsEditorComponent {
+  private readonly formBuilder = inject(FormBuilder);
+
+  readonly requiredMaterials = input.required<FormArray<TemplateRequiredMaterialFormGroup>>();
+  readonly materials = input.required<MaterialOption[]>();
+
+  readonly addMaterialForm = this.formBuilder.group({
+    materialId: this.formBuilder.control<number | string | null>(null, Validators.required),
+    quantity: this.formBuilder.control(1, {
+      validators: [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)],
+      nonNullable: true
+    })
+  });
+
+  addMaterial(): void {
+    if (this.addMaterialForm.invalid) {
+      this.addMaterialForm.markAllAsTouched();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const materialId = this.addMaterialForm.controls.materialId.value;
+    const quantity = this.addMaterialForm.controls.quantity.getRawValue();
+    const selectedMaterial = this.materials().find((material) => material.id === materialId);
+
+    if (!selectedMaterial) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (this.isSelected(selectedMaterial.id)) {
+      this.addMaterialForm.controls.materialId.setErrors({ duplicate: true });
+      this.addMaterialForm.controls.materialId.markAsTouched();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    this.requiredMaterials().push(
+      this.formBuilder.group({
+        materialId: this.formBuilder.control(selectedMaterial.id, {
+          validators: [Validators.required],
+          nonNullable: true
+        }),
+        name: this.formBuilder.control(selectedMaterial.name, {
+          validators: [Validators.required],
+          nonNullable: true
+        }),
+        quantity: this.formBuilder.control(
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/template-subtasks-editor/template-subtasks-editor.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+<section class="template-subtasks-editor">
+  <div class="template-subtasks-editor__header">
+    <div>
+      <p class="template-subtasks-editor__title">Subtareas del template</p>
+      <p class="template-subtasks-editor__subtitle">Definí la estructura base con subtareas raíz e hijas vinculadas.</p>
+    </div>
+
+    <button mat-stroked-button type="button" (click)="addRootSubtask()">
+      <mat-icon>add</mat-icon>
+      <span>Agregar subtarea</span>
+    </button>
+  </div>
+
+  <ng-template #subtaskTree let-items let-depth="depth">
+    <div class="template-subtasks-editor__list">
+      @for (subtask of items.controls; track trackSubtask(subtask)) {
+        <article class="template-subtasks-editor__item" [style.marginLeft.rem]="depth * 1.1">
+          <div class="template-subtasks-editor__item-row">
+            <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic" class="template-subtasks-editor__field">
+              <mat-label>Título de subtarea</mat-label>
+              <input matInput [formControl]="subtask.controls.title" placeholder="Ej. Validar conectividad del sitio" />
+              @if (subtask.controls.title.hasError('required') && subtask.controls.title.touched) {
+                <mat-error>El título es obligatorio.</mat-error>
+              }
+            </mat-form-field>
+
+            <div class="template-subtasks-editor__actions">
+              <button mat-icon-button type="button" (click)="addChildSubtask(subtask)" aria-label="Agregar subtarea hija">
+                <mat-icon>subdirectory_arrow_right</mat-icon>
+              </button>
+
+              <button mat-icon-button type="button" (click)="removeSubtask(items, $index)" aria-label="Eliminar subtarea">
+                <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+
+          @if (childrenOf(subtask).length) {
+            <div class="template-subtasks-editor__children">
+              <ng-container
+                [ngTemplateOutlet]="subtaskTree"
+                [ngTemplateOutletContext]="{ $implicit: childrenOf(subtask), depth: depth + 1 }"
+              ></ng-container>
+            </div>
+          }
+        </article>
+      }
+    </div>
+  </ng-template>
+
+  @if (subtasks().length) {
+    <ng-container [ngTemplateOutlet]="subtaskTree" [ngTemplateOutletContext]="{ $implicit: subtasks(), depth: 0 }"></ng-container>
+  } @else {
+    <div class="template-subtasks-editor__empty">
+      <mat-icon>list_alt</mat-icon>
+      <p>Todavía no agregaste subtareas a este template.</p>
+    </div>
+  }
+</section>
```

```diff
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__header {
+  display: flex;

+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__title,
+.template-subtasks-editor__subtitle,
+.template-subtasks-editor__empty p {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__title {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__subtitle {
+  margin-top: 0.25rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.85rem;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__item {
+  position: relative;
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__item::before {
+  content: '';
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0 auto 0 0;
+  width: 4px;
+  border-radius: 1rem 0 0 1rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.85), rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.2));
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__item-row {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  align-items: start;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__field {
+  width: 100%;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__actions {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  gap: 0.25rem;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__children {
+  padding-top: 0.1rem;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+  padding: 1.4rem;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.14);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  text-align: center;
+}
+
+.template-subtasks-editor__empty mat-icon {
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 768px) {
+  .template-subtasks-editor__header {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .template-subtasks-editor__item-row {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .template-subtasks-editor__actions {
+    justify-content: flex-end;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/template-subtasks-editor/template-subtasks-editor.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/task-templates/components/template-subtasks-editor/template-subtasks-editor.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+import { NgTemplateOutlet } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { FormArray, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+
+import { TemplateSubtask } from '../../../../core/models/template-subtask.model';
+import { TemplateSubtaskFormGroup } from '../task-template-form.types';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-template-subtasks-editor',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    MatButtonModule,
+    MatFormFieldModule,
+    MatIconModule,
+    MatInputModule,
+    NgTemplateOutlet,
+    ReactiveFormsModule
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './template-subtasks-editor.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './template-subtasks-editor.component.scss'
+})
+export class TemplateSubtasksEditorComponent {
+  readonly subtasks = input.required<FormArray<TemplateSubtaskFormGroup>>();
+  readonly buildSubtask = input.required<(subtask?: Partial<TemplateSubtask>) => TemplateSubtaskFormGroup>();
+
+  addRootSubtask(): void {
+    this.subtasks().push(this.buildSubtask()());
+  }
+
+  addChildSubtask(parent: TemplateSubtaskFormGroup): void {
+    parent.controls.children.push(this.buildSubtask()());
+  }
+
+  removeSubtask(container: FormArray<TemplateSubtaskFormGroup>, index: number): void {
+    container.removeAt(index);
+    container.markAsDirty();
+    container.markAsTouched();
+  }
+
+  childrenOf(subtask: TemplateSubtaskFormGroup): FormArray<TemplateSubtaskFormGroup> {
+    return subtask.controls.children;
+  }
+
+  trackSubtask(subtask: TemplateSubtaskFormGroup): string {
+    return subtask.controls.id.value;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="task-attachments-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Adjuntos mock</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>Fotos y videos asociados al avance operativo. Se guarda metadata en localStorage.</mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+

+        <span>Agregar fotos o videos</span>
+      </button>
+
+      <p class="task-attachments-section__hint">
+        @if (disabled()) {
+          Tarea finalizada: los adjuntos quedan solo en lectura.

+          El binario real no se persiste; la preview solo dura en la sesión activa del navegador.
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-attachments-section/task-attachments-section.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-attachments-section/task-attachments-section.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+import { Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+
+import { TaskAttachment } from '../../../../core/models/task-attachment.model';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-task-attachments-section',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatButtonModule, MatCardModule, MatIconModule],
+  templateUrl: './task-attachments-section.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './task-attachments-section.component.scss'
+})
+export class TaskAttachmentsSectionComponent {
+  readonly attachments = input.required<readonly TaskAttachment[]>();
+  readonly disabled = input(false);
+  readonly attachmentsSelected = output<readonly File[]>();
+  readonly attachmentRemoved = output<string>();
+
+  onFileSelection(event: Event): void {
+    const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
+    const files = Array.from(input.files ?? []);
+
+    if (files.length) {
+      this.attachmentsSelected.emit(files);
+    }
+
+    input.value = '';
+  }
+
+  removeAttachment(attachmentId: string): void {
+    this.attachmentRemoved.emit(attachmentId);
+  }
+
+  trackByAttachmentId(_: number, attachment: TaskAttachment): string {
+    return attachment.id;
+  }
+
+  iconFor(attachment: TaskAttachment): string {
+    if (attachment.kind === 'image') {
+      return 'image';
+    }
+
+    if (attachment.kind === 'video') {
+      return 'videocam';
+    }
+
+    return 'attach_file';
+  }
+
+  formatSize(size: number | null | undefined): string {
+    if (!size || size <= 0) {
+      return 'Tamaño no disponible';
+    }
+
+    if (size >= 1024 * 1024) {
+      return `${(size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`;
+    }
+
+    if (size >= 1024) {
+      return `${Math.round(size / 1024)} KB`;
+    }
+
+    return `${size} B`;
+  }
+
+  canPreview(attachment: TaskAttachment): boolean {
+    return Boolean(attachment.previewUrl && (attachment.kind === 'image' || attachment.kind === 'video'));
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-checklist-tree/task-checklist-tree.component.html`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-checklist-tree/task-checklist-tree.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+<div class="task-checklist-tree">
+  <ng-template #subtaskList let-items let-depth="depth">
+    <div class="task-checklist-tree__level">
+      @for (subtask of items; track subtask.id) {
+        <section class="task-checklist-tree__item" [style.--task-depth]="depth">
+          <div
+            class="task-checklist-tree__row"
+            [class.task-checklist-tree__row--completed]="subtask.completed"
+            [class.task-checklist-tree__row--blocked]="subtask.blocked"
+          >
+            <mat-checkbox
+              class="task-checklist-tree__checkbox"
+              [checked]="subtask.completed"
+              [disabled]="disabled() || (!subtask.enabled && !subtask.completed)"
+              (change)="onToggle(subtask.id, $event)"
+            >
+              {{ subtask.title }}
+            </mat-checkbox>
+
+            <div class="task-checklist-tree__status">
+              @if (subtask.blocked) {
+                <mat-icon>lock</mat-icon>
+              } @else if (subtask.completed) {
+                <mat-icon>check_circle</mat-icon>
+              } @else {
+                <mat-icon>play_circle</mat-icon>
+              }
+
+              <span>{{ stateLabel(subtask) }}</span>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+
+          @if (subtask.children.length) {
+            <div class="task-checklist-tree__children">
+              <ng-container *ngTemplateOutlet="subtaskList; context: { $implicit: subtask.children, depth: depth + 1 }" />
+            </div>
+          }
+        </section>
+      }
+    </div>
+  </ng-template>
+
+  <ng-container *ngTemplateOutlet="subtaskList; context: { $implicit: subtasks(), depth: 0 }" />
+</div>
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-checklist-tree/task-checklist-tree.component.scss

+.task-checklist-tree {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.85rem;
+}
+
+.task-checklist-tree__level {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+}
+
+.task-checklist-tree__item {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+}
+
+.task-checklist-tree__row {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  margin-left: calc(var(--task-depth, 0) * 1.35rem);
+  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);

+.task-checklist-tree__row--completed {

+}
+
```

```diff

Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644

+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-checklist-tree/task-checklist-tree.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+import { NgTemplateOutlet } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatCheckboxChange, MatCheckboxModule } from '@angular/material/checkbox';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+
+import { TaskExecutionSubtaskView } from '../../../../core/models/task-execution.model';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-task-checklist-tree',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [NgTemplateOutlet, MatCheckboxModule, MatIconModule],
+  templateUrl: './task-checklist-tree.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './task-checklist-tree.component.scss'
+})
+export class TaskChecklistTreeComponent {
+  readonly subtasks = input.required<readonly TaskExecutionSubtaskView[]>();
+  readonly disabled = input(false);
+  readonly subtaskToggled = output<{ subtaskId: string; completed: boolean }>();
+
+  onToggle(subtaskId: string, event: MatCheckboxChange): void {
+    this.subtaskToggled.emit({ subtaskId, completed: event.checked });
+  }
+
+  stateLabel(subtask: TaskExecutionSubtaskView): string {
+    if (subtask.completed) {
+      return 'Completada';
+    }
+
+    if (subtask.blocked) {
+      return 'Bloqueada';
+    }
+
+    return 'Disponible';
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="task-comment-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Comentario operativo</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>Notas libres del ejecutor para conservar contexto mientras la tarea sigue en curso.</mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic" class="task-comment-section__field">

+      <textarea
+        matInput
+        rows="6"
+        [formControl]="commentControl"
+        [placeholder]="disabled() ? 'La tarea está finalizada y el comentario quedó solo en lectura.' : 'Ej. Cliente confirmó horario, faltan fotos del gabinete.'"
+      ></textarea>
+      <mat-hint>{{ disabled() ? 'Solo lectura luego de finalizar la tarea.' : 'Se guarda automáticamente en el mock local.' }}</mat-hint>

+</mat-card>
```


#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-comment-section/task-comment-section.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/task-comment-section/task-comment-section.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import { effect, Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { takeUntilDestroyed } from '@angular/core/rxjs-interop';
+import { FormControl, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+import { debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged } from 'rxjs';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-task-comment-section',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatCardModule, MatFormFieldModule, MatInputModule, ReactiveFormsModule],
+  templateUrl: './task-comment-section.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './task-comment-section.component.scss'
+})
+export class TaskCommentSectionComponent {
+  readonly comment = input('');
+  readonly disabled = input(false);
+  readonly commentChange = output<string>();
+  readonly commentControl = new FormControl('', { nonNullable: true });
+
+  constructor() {
+    effect(() => {
+      const nextComment = this.comment();
+
+      if (this.commentControl.value !== nextComment) {
+        this.commentControl.setValue(nextComment, { emitEvent: false });
+      }
+
+      if (this.disabled()) {
+        this.commentControl.disable({ emitEvent: false });
+        return;
+      }
+
+      this.commentControl.enable({ emitEvent: false });
+    });
+
+    this.commentControl.valueChanges
+      .pipe(debounceTime(250), distinctUntilChanged(), takeUntilDestroyed())
+      .subscribe((value) => this.commentChange.emit(value));
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+@if (task$ | async; as task) {
+  <section class="task-execution-page">
+    <div class="task-execution-page__topbar">
+      <a mat-stroked-button routerLink="/tasks" class="task-execution-page__back-link">
+        <mat-icon>arrow_back</mat-icon>
+        <span>Volver al listado</span>
+      </a>
+
+      <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" [disabled]="task.finalized || !task.canFinalize" (click)="finalizeTask()">
+        <mat-icon>{{ task.finalized ? 'task_alt' : 'check_circle' }}</mat-icon>
+        <span>{{ task.finalized ? 'Tarea finalizada' : 'Finalizar tarea' }}</span>
+      </button>
+    </div>
+
+    <div class="task-execution-page__header">
+      <app-page-title
+        eyebrow="Ejecución de tarea"
+        [title]="task.title"
+        [subtitle]="task.summary"
+      />
+
+      <div class="task-execution-page__header-side">
+        <app-status-badge [label]="task.status" [tone]="task.statusTone" />
+
+        <div class="task-execution-page__assignee">
+          <app-user-avatar [initials]="task.assigneeInitials" [size]="40" />
+          <div>
+            <p class="task-execution-page__meta-label">Asignado a</p>
+            <p class="task-execution-page__meta-value">{{ task.assigneeName }}</p>

+        </div>
+      </div>

+
+    <div class="task-execution-page__summary-grid">

+        <mat-card-content>
+          <p class="task-execution-page__summary-label">Cliente</p>
+          <p class="task-execution-page__summary-value">{{ task.client }}</p>
+        </mat-card-content>

+

+            {{ task.updatedAt ? (task.updatedAt | date: 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') : 'Sin cambios guardados todavía' }}
+          </p>
+          <p class="task-exe
```

```diff
+.task-execution-page {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.35rem;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__topbar,
+.task-execution-page__header,
+.task-execution-page__assignee,
+.task-execution-page__summary-card mat-card-content {
+  display: flex;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__topbar {
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__back-link mat-icon,
+.task-execution-page__topbar button mat-icon {
+  margin-right: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__header {
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__header-side {
+  display: grid;
+  justify-items: end;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__assignee {
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__meta-label,
+.task-execution-page__meta-value,
+.task-execution-page__summary-label,
+.task-execution-page__summary-value,
+.task-execution-page__summary-caption,
+.task-execution-page__footer-note,
+.task-execution-page__empty-card h2,
+.task-execution-page__empty-card p {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__meta-label,
+.task-execution-page__summary-label {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.76rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__meta-value,
+.task-execution-page__summary-value {
+  margin-top: 0.25rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__summary-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__summary-card,
+.task-execution-page__checklist-card,
+.task-execution-page__empty-card {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.06);
+  border-radius: 1.45rem;
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel);
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__summary-card mat-card-content {
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__summary-caption {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.8rem;
+  line-height: 1.45;
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__progress-bar {
+  width: 100%;
+  height: 0.6rem;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__progress-bar span {
+  display: block;
+  height: 100%;
+  border-radius: inherit;
+  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--brand-red), #f4b740);
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__content {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.65fr) minmax(18rem, 0.95fr);
+}
+
+.task-execution-page__checklist-card mat-card-header,
+.task-executio
```

```diff
+import { AsyncPipe, DatePipe } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, inject } from '@angular/core';
+import { ActivatedRoute, RouterLink } from '@angular/router';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { map, switchMap } from 'rxjs';
+
+import { MockTaskExecutionService } from '../../../../core/services/mock-task-execution.service';
+import { PageTitleComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/page-title/page-title.component';
+import { StatusBadgeComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/status-badge/status-badge.component';
+import { UserAvatarComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/user-avatar/user-avatar.component';
+import { TaskAttachmentsSectionComponent } from '../task-attachments-section/task-attachments-section.component';
+import { TaskChecklistTreeComponent } from '../task-checklist-tree/task-checklist-tree.component';
+import { TaskCommentSectionComponent } from '../task-comment-section/task-comment-section.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-task-execution-page',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    AsyncPipe,
+    DatePipe,
+    MatButtonModule,
+    MatCardModule,
+    MatIconModule,
+    PageTitleComponent,
+    RouterLink,
+    StatusBadgeComponent,
+    TaskAttachmentsSectionComponent,
+    TaskChecklistTreeComponent,
+    TaskCommentSectionComponent,
+    UserAvatarComponent
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './task-execution-page.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './task-execution-page.component.scss'
+})
+export class TaskExecutionPageComponent {
+  private readonly activatedRoute = inject(ActivatedRoute);
+  private readonly mockTaskExecutionService = inject(MockTaskExecutionService);
+
+  readonly task$ = this.activatedRoute.paramMap.pipe(
+    map((params) => params.get('taskId') ?? ''),
+    switchMap((taskId) => this.mockTaskExecutionService.getTaskExecution(taskId))
+  );
+
+  toggleSubtask(subtaskId: string, completed: boolean): void {
+    const taskId = this.taskId();
+
+    if (taskId) {
+      this.mockTaskExecutionService.updateSubtask(taskId, subtaskId, completed);
+    }
+  }
+
+  updateComment(comment: string): void {
+    const taskId = this.taskId();
+
+    if (taskId) {
+      this.mockTaskExecutionService.updateComment(taskId, comment);
+    }
+  }
+
+  addAttachments(files: readonly File[]): void {
+    const taskId = this.taskId();
+
+    if (taskId) {
+      this.mockTaskExecutionService.addAttachments(taskId, files);
+    }
+  }
+
+  removeAttachment(attachmentId: string): void {
+    const taskId = thi
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

```diff
+<h2 mat-dialog-title>Crear ticket</h2>
+
+<mat-dialog-content>
+  @if (viewModel$ | async; as viewModel) {
+    <form class="create-ticket-dialog__form" [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="submit()">
+      <section class="create-ticket-dialog__intro">
+        <p class="create-ticket-dialog__intro-title">Registro inicial de incidencia</p>
+        <p class="create-ticket-dialog__intro-copy">
+          Documenta el problema reportado, el equipo afectado y los insumos previstos para resolverlo.
+        </p>
+      </section>
+
+      <div class="create-ticket-dialog__fields">
+        <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+          <mat-label>Titulo</mat-label>
+          <input matInput formControlName="title" placeholder="Ej. Sin imagen en monitor de recepcion" />
+          @if (form.controls.title.hasError('required') && form.controls.title.touched) {
+            <mat-error>El titulo es obligatorio.</mat-error>
+          }
+        </mat-form-field>
+
+        <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">

+          @if (form.controls.categoryId.hasError('required') && form.controls.categoryId.touched) {
+            <mat-error>Selecciona una categoria.</mat-error>

+        </mat-form-field>
+
+        <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">

+          </mat-select>
+          @if (form.controls.priority.hasError('required') && form.controls.priority.touched) {
+            <mat-error>Selecciona una prioridad.</mat-error>

+
```

```diff
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/create-ticket-dialog/create-ticket-dialog.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,88 @@
+:host {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__form {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.15rem;
+  min-width: min(100%, 58rem);
+  padding-top: 0.25rem;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__intro {
+  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.05), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94));
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__intro-title,
+.create-ticket-dialog__intro-copy {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__intro-title {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__intro-copy {
+  margin-top: 0.3rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  line-height: 1.55;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__fields {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__description-field,
+.create-ticket-dialog__device-field {
+  grid-column: 1 / -1;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__device-option {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.18rem;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__device-option small {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.create-ticket-dialog__section {
+  padding: 1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1.15rem;
+  background: rgba(250, 250, 251, 0.96);
+}
+
+mat-dialog-content {
+  max-height: min(78dvh, 54rem);
+  padding-top: 0.25rem;
+}
+
+mat-dialog-actions {
+  padding: 0;
+  margin-top: 0.1rem;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 900px) {
+  .create-ticket-dialog__form {
+    min-width: 0;
+  }
+
+  .create-ticket-dialog__fields {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .create-ticket-dialog__description-field,
+  .create-ticket-dialog__device-field {
+    grid-column: auto;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+import { FormArray, FormControl, FormGroup } from '@angular/forms';
+
+export interface RequiredInventoryItemFormModel {
+  itemId: FormControl<number | string>;
+  name: FormControl<string>;
+  quantity: FormControl<number>;
+  unit: FormControl<string>;
+}
+
+export type RequiredInventoryItemFormGroup = FormGroup<RequiredInventoryItemFormModel>;
+
+export interface CreateTicketFormModel {
+  title: FormControl<string>;
+  description: FormControl<string>;
+  categoryId: FormControl<number | string | null>;
+  affectedDeviceId: FormControl<number | string | null>;
+  priority: FormControl<string | null>;
+  requiredItems: FormArray<RequiredInventoryItemFormGroup>;
+}
+
+export type CreateTicketFormGroup = FormGroup<CreateTicketFormModel>;
```

```diff
+<section class="required-items-editor">
+  <div class="required-items-editor__header">
+    <div>
+      <p class="required-items-editor__title">Items requeridos de deposito</p>
+      <p class="required-items-editor__subtitle">Asocia insumos previstos para resolver la incidencia y dejar lista la referencia operativa.</p>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <div class="required-items-editor__add-row" [formGroup]="addItemForm">
+    <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+      <mat-label>Item de deposito</mat-label>
+      <mat-select formControlName="itemId">
+        @for (item of items(); track item.id) {
+          <mat-option [value]="item.id" [disabled]="isSelected(item.id)">
+            {{ item.name }}
+            @if (item.unit) {
+              <span class="required-items-editor__unit-hint">({{ item.unit }})</span>
+            }
+          </mat-option>
+        }
+      </mat-select>
+      @if (addItemForm.controls.itemId.hasError('required') && addItemForm.controls.itemId.touched) {
+        <mat-error>Selecciona un item.</mat-error>
+      }
+      @if (addItemForm.controls.itemId.hasError('duplicate')) {
+        <mat-error>Ese item ya fue agregado al ticket.</mat-error>
+      }
+    </mat-form-field>
+
+    <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+      <mat-label>Cantidad</mat-label>
+      <input matInput type="number" min="1" formControlName="quantity" />
+      @if (addItemForm.controls.quantity.invalid && addItemForm.controls.quantity.touched) {

+      }
+    </mat-form-field>
+
+    <button mat-stroked-button type="button" (click)="addItem()">
+      <mat-icon>add</mat-icon>
+      <span>Agregar item</span>
+    </button>
+  </div>
+
+  @if (requiredItems().length) {
+    <div class="required-items-editor__list">

+    <div class="re
```

```diff
+.required-items-editor {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__title,
+.required-items-editor__subtitle,
+.required-items-editor__item-name,
+.required-items-editor__item-meta,
+.required-items-editor__empty p {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__title {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__subtitle {
+  margin-top: 0.25rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__add-row {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(8rem, 0.8fr) auto;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  align-items: start;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__unit-hint {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__item {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__item-name {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__item-meta {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.82rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+  padding: 1.4rem;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.14);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  text-align: center;
+}
+
+.required-items-editor__empty mat-icon {
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 768px) {
+  .required-items-editor__add-row {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+}
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/required-items-editor/required-items-editor.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/required-items-editor/required-items-editor.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+import { Component, inject, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { FormArray, FormBuilder, ReactiveFormsModule, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+import { MatSelectModule } from '@angular/material/select';
+
+import { InventoryItemOption } from '../../../../core/models/inventory-item.model';
+import { RequiredInventoryItemFormGroup } from '../create-ticket-form.types';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-required-items-editor',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    MatButtonModule,
+    MatFormFieldModule,
+    MatIconModule,
+    MatInputModule,
+    MatSelectModule,
+    ReactiveFormsModule
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './required-items-editor.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './required-items-editor.component.scss'
+})
+export class RequiredItemsEditorComponent {
+  private readonly formBuilder = inject(FormBuilder);
+
+  readonly requiredItems = input.required<FormArray<RequiredInventoryItemFormGroup>>();
+  readonly items = input.required<InventoryItemOption[]>();
+
+  readonly addItemForm = this.formBuilder.group({
+    itemId: this.formBuilder.control<number | string | null>(null, Validators.required),
+    quantity: this.formBuilder.control(1, {
+      validators: [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)],
+      nonNullable: true
+    })
+  });
+
+  addItem(): void {
+    if (this.addItemForm.invalid) {
+      this.addItemForm.markAllAsTouched();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const itemId = this.addItemForm.controls.itemId.value;
+    const quantity = this.addItemForm.controls.quantity.getRawValue();
+    const selectedItem = this.items().find((item) => item.id === itemId);
+
+    if (!selectedItem) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (this.isSelected(selectedItem.id)) {
+      this.addItemForm.controls.itemId.setErrors({ duplicate: true });
+      this.addItemForm.controls.itemId.markAsTouched();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    this.requiredItems().push(
+      this.formBuilder.group({
+        itemId: this.formBuilder.control(selectedItem.id, {
+          validators: [Validators.required],
+          nonNullable: true
+        }),
+        name: this.formBuilder.control(selectedItem.name, {
+          validators: [Validators.required],
+          nonNullable: true
+        }),
+        quantity: this.formBuilder.control(quantity, {
+          validators: [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)],
+          nonNullable: true
+        }),
+     
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

```diff
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+<mat-card class="ticket-attachments-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Adjuntos del ticket</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>
+      @if (canEdit()) {
+        Fotos y videos del diagnóstico técnico. El binario real no se persiste; la metadata sí.
+      } @else {
+        Evidencia visual cargada en el ticket. Visible para seguimiento cruzado entre técnico, depósito y admin.
+      }
+    </mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    @if (canEdit()) {
+      <div class="ticket-attachments-section__actions">
+        <input #fileInput type="file" accept="image/*,video/*" multiple hidden (change)="onFileSelection($event)" />
+
+        <button mat-stroked-button type="button" (click)="fileInput.click()">
+          <mat-icon>upload_file</mat-icon>
+          <span>Agregar fotos o videos</span>
+        </button>
+
+        <p class="ticket-attachments-section__hint">La preview completa dura durante la sesión activa del navegador.</p>
+      </div>
+    }
+
+    @if (attachments().length) {
+      <div class="ticket-attachments-section__list">
+        @for (attachment of attachments(); track trackByAttachmentId($index, attachment)) {
+          <article class="ticket-attachments-section__item">
+            <div class="ticket-attachments-section__preview" [class.ticket-attachments-section__preview--placeholder]="!canPreview(attachment)">
+              @if (attachment.kind === 'image' && attachment.previewUrl) {
+                <img [src]="attachment.previewUrl" [alt]="attachment.fileName" />
+              } @else if (attachment.kind === 'video' && attachment.previewUrl) {
+                <video controls preload="metadata">
+                  <source [src]="attachment.previewUrl" [type]="attachment.fileType" />
+                </video>
+              } @else {
+                <mat-icon>{{ iconFor(attachment) }}</mat-icon>
+              }
+            </div>
+
+            <div class="ticket-attachments-section__meta">
+              <div>
+                <p class="ticket-attachments-section__name">{{ attachment.fileName }}</p>
+                <p class="ticket-attachments-section__details">{{ attachment.fileType }} · {{ formatSize(attachment.size) }}</p>
+              </div>
+
+              @if (canEdit()) {
+                <button mat-icon-button type="button" aria-label="Quitar adjunto" (click)="removeAttachment(attachment.id)">
+                  <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
+                </button>
+              }
+            </div>
+
+            @if (!attachment.previewUrl && (attachment.kind === 'image
```

```diff
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/ticket-attachments-section/ticket-attachments-section.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+.ticket-attachments-section {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.06);
+  border-radius: 1.45rem;
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel);
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section mat-card-header,
+.ticket-attachments-section mat-card-content {
+  padding-inline: 1.25rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section mat-card-header {
+  padding-top: 1.15rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__actions {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__actions button {
+  justify-self: flex-start;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__actions mat-icon {
+  margin-right: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__hint,
+.ticket-attachments-section__name,
+.ticket-attachments-section__details,
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview-note,
+.ticket-attachments-section__empty p {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__hint,
+.ticket-attachments-section__details,
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview-note {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.8rem;
+  line-height: 1.45;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__item {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(248, 249, 251, 0.94));
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 10rem;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border-radius: 0.9rem;
+  background: rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.04);
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview img,
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview video {
+  display: block;
+  width: 100%;
+  max-height: 15rem;
+  object-fit: cover;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__preview--placeholder mat-icon {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  transform: scale(1.35);
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__meta {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__name {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.ticket-attachments-section__empty {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.55rem;
+  margin-top: 1rem;
+  padding: 1.4rem 1rem;
+  border: 1px dashed rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.16);
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  text-align: center;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 640px) {
+  .ticket-attachments-section__actions button {
+    justify-self: stretch;
+  }
+
+  .ticket-attachments-section__meta {
+    align-items: stretch;
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/ticket-attachments-section/ticket-attachments-section.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/ticket-attachments-section/ticket-attachments-section.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+import { Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+
+import { TicketAttachment } from '../../../../core/models/ticket-attachment.model';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-ticket-attachments-section',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatButtonModule, MatCardModule, MatIconModule],
+  templateUrl: './ticket-attachments-section.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './ticket-attachments-section.component.scss'
+})
+export class TicketAttachmentsSectionComponent {
+  readonly attachments = input.required<readonly TicketAttachment[]>();
+  readonly canEdit = input(false);
+  readonly attachmentsSelected = output<readonly File[]>();
+  readonly attachmentRemoved = output<string>();
+
+  onFileSelection(event: Event): void {
+    const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
+    const files = Array.from(input.files ?? []);
+
+    if (files.length) {
+      this.attachmentsSelected.emit(files);
+    }
+
+    input.value = '';
+  }
+
+  removeAttachment(attachmentId: string): void {
+    this.attachmentRemoved.emit(attachmentId);
+  }
+
+  trackByAttachmentId(_: number, attachment: TicketAttachment): string {
+    return attachment.id;
+  }
+
+  iconFor(attachment: TicketAttachment): string {
+    if (attachment.kind === 'image') {
+      return 'image';
+    }
+
+    if (attachment.kind === 'video') {
+      return 'videocam';
+    }
+
+    return 'attach_file';
+  }
+
+  formatSize(size: number | null | undefined): string {
+    if (!size || size <= 0) {
+      return 'Tamaño no disponible';
+    }
+
+    if (size >= 1024 * 1024) {
+      return `${(size / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`;
+    }
+
+    if (size >= 1024) {
+      return `${Math.round(size / 1024)} KB`;
+    }
+
+    return `${size} B`;
+  }
+
+  canPreview(attachment: TicketAttachment): boolean {
+    return Boolean(attachment.previewUrl && (attachment.kind === 'image' || attachment.kind === 'video'));
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="ticket-description-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Descripción del ticket</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>Información base del problema reportado y del contexto operativo asociado.</mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    <p class="ticket-description-section__body">{{ ticket().description }}</p>
+
+    <div class="ticket-description-section__grid">
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Categoría</p>
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__value">{{ ticket().category }}</p>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Dispositivo afectado</p>
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__value">{{ ticket().affectedDevice }}</p>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Prioridad</p>
+        <app-priority-indicator [label]="ticket().priority" [tone]="ticket().priorityTone" />
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Estado</p>
+        <app-status-badge [label]="ticket().status" [tone]="ticket().statusTone" />
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Creado</p>
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__value">{{ ticket().createdAt | date: 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm' }}</p>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Técnico asignado</p>
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__value">{{ ticket().assigneeName || 'Sin asignar' }}</p>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-description-section__item ticket-description-section__item--wide">
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__label">Depósito asignado</p>
+        <p class="ticket-description-section__value">{{ ticket().depositAssigneeName || 'Sin asignar' }}</p>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  </mat-card-content>
+</mat-card>
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+.ticket-description-section {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.06);

+}
+
+.ticket-description-section mat-card-header,
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="ticket-dispatch-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Items despachados</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>
+      Registro mock de materiales enviados para resolver este ticket. No descuenta stock real ni valida disponibilidad.
+    </mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    @if (canManageDispatch()) {
+      <section class="ticket-dispatch-section__composer" [formGroup]="dispatchForm">
+        <div class="ticket-dispatch-section__composer-grid">
+          <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+            <mat-label>Item despachado</mat-label>
+            <mat-select formControlName="inventoryItemId">
+              @for (item of inventoryOptions(); track item.id) {
+                <mat-option [value]="item.id">{{ item.name }}</mat-option>
+              }
+            </mat-select>
+          </mat-form-field>
+
+          <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+            <mat-label>Cantidad</mat-label>
+            <input matInput type="number" min="1" formControlName="quantity" />
+          </mat-form-field>
+
+          <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" (click)="createDispatch()">
+            <mat-icon>local_shipping</mat-icon>
+            <span>Registrar despacho</span>
+          </button>
+        </div>
+
+        <p class="ticket-dispatch-section__hint">
+          @if (approvedRequestCount()) {
+            Hay {{ approvedRequestCount() }} solicitud{{ approvedRequestCount() > 1 ? 'es' : '' }} autorizada{{ approvedRequestCount() > 1 ? 's' : '' }} para tomar como referencia.
+          } @else {
+            Todavía no hay solicitudes autorizadas; el despacho puede registrarse igual en esta iteración mock.
+          }
+        </p>
+      </section>
+    }
+
+    @if (dispatchedItems().length) {
+      <div class="ticket-dispatch-section__list">
+        @for (item of dispatchedItems(); track item.inventoryItemId + '-' + item.quantity + '-' + $index) {
+          <article class="ticket-dispatch-section__item">
+            <div>
+              <p class="ticket-dispatch-section__name">{{ item.inventoryItemName }}</p>
+              <p class="ticket-dispatch-section__meta">Cantidad despachada: {{ item.quantity }}</p>
+            </div>
+
+            <mat-icon>inventory</mat-icon>
+          </article>
+        }
+      </div>
+    } @else {
+      <div class="ticket-dispatch-section__empty">
+        <mat-icon>inventory_2</mat-icon>
+        <p>No hay items despachados registrados todavía.</p>
+      </div>
+    }
+  </ma
```

```diff
+import { Component, inject, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { FormBuilder, ReactiveFormsModule, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+import { MatSelectModule } from '@angular/material/select';
+
+import { InventoryItemOption } from '../../../../core/models/inventory-item.model';
+import { TicketDispatchItem } from '../../../../core/models/ticket-dispatch.model';
+import { TicketInventoryRequest } from '../../../../core/models/ticket-inventory-request.model';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-ticket-dispatch-section',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatButtonModule, MatCardModule, MatFormFieldModule, MatIconModule, MatInputModule, MatSelectModule, ReactiveFormsModule],
+  templateUrl: './ticket-dispatch-section.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './ticket-dispatch-section.component.scss'
+})
+export class TicketDispatchSectionComponent {
+  private readonly formBuilder = inject(FormBuilder);
+
+  readonly inventoryOptions = input.required<readonly InventoryItemOption[]>();
+  readonly requests = input.required<readonly TicketInventoryRequest[]>();
+  readonly dispatchedItems = input.required<readonly TicketDispatchItem[]>();
+  readonly canManageDispatch = input(false);
+  readonly dispatchCreated = output<TicketDispatchItem>();
+
+  readonly dispatchForm = this.formBuilder.group({
+    inventoryItemId: this.formBuilder.control<number | string | null>(null, Validators.required),
+    quantity: this.formBuilder.control(1, {
+      validators: [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)],
+      nonNullable: true
+    })
+  });
+
+  approvedRequestCount(): number {
+    return this.requests().filter((request) => request.status === 'approved').length;
+  }
+
+  createDispatch(): void {
+    if (this.dispatchForm.invalid) {
+      this.dispatchForm.markAllAsTouched();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const inventoryItemId = this.dispatchForm.controls.inventoryItemId.getRawValue();
+    const selectedItem = this.inventoryOptions().find((item) => item.id === inventoryItemId);
+
+    if (!selectedItem) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    this.dispatchCreated.emit({
+      inventoryItemId: selectedItem.id,
+      inventoryItemName: selectedItem.name,
+      quantity: this.dispatchForm.controls.quantity.getRawValue()
+    });
+
+    this.dispatchForm.reset({ inventoryItemId: null, quantity: 1
```

```diff
+@if (viewModel$ | async; as viewModel) {
+  @if (viewModel.ticket; as ticket) {
+    <section class="ticket-execution-page">
+      <div class="ticket-execution-page__topbar">
+        <a mat-stroked-button routerLink="/tickets" class="ticket-execution-page__back-link">
+          <mat-icon>arrow_back</mat-icon>
+          <span>Volver al listado</span>
+        </a>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-execution-page__header">
+        <app-page-title eyebrow="Ejecución de ticket" [title]="ticket.title" [subtitle]="ticket.description" />
+
+        <div class="ticket-execution-page__header-side">
+          <app-status-badge [label]="ticket.status" [tone]="ticket.statusTone" />
+
+          <div class="ticket-execution-page__assignee-blocks">
+            <div class="ticket-execution-page__assignee">
+              <app-user-avatar [initials]="ticket.assigneeInitials || '?'" [size]="40" />
+              <div>
+                <p class="ticket-execution-page__meta-label">Técnico</p>
+                <p class="ticket-execution-page__meta-value">{{ ticket.assigneeName || 'Sin asignar' }}</p>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+

+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="ticket-execution-page__summary-grid">

+          <mat-card-content>
+            <p class="ticket-execution-page__summary-label">Categoría</p>
```

```diff
+.ticket-execution-page {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.35rem;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__topbar,
+.ticket-execution-page__header,
+.ticket-execution-page__assignee,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-card mat-card-content {
+  display: flex;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__topbar {
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__back-link mat-icon {
+  margin-right: 0.35rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__header {
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__header-side,
+.ticket-execution-page__assignee-blocks,
+.ticket-execution-page__main-column,
+.ticket-execution-page__sidebar {
+  display: grid;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__header-side {
+  justify-items: end;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__assignee-blocks {
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__assignee {
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__meta-label,
+.ticket-execution-page__meta-value,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-label,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-value,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-caption,
+.ticket-execution-page__empty-card h2,
+.ticket-execution-page__empty-card p {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__meta-label,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-label {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.76rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__meta-value,
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-value {
+  margin-top: 0.25rem;
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-card,

+}
+

+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__summary-caption {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.8rem;
+  line-height: 1.45;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__content {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.55fr) minmax(18rem, 0.95fr);
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__main-column,
+.ticket-execution-page__sidebar {
+  align-content: start;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page--empty {
+  place-items: center;
+  min-height: 50vh;
+}
+
+.ticket-execution-page__empty-card mat-card-conte
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="ticket-inventory-request-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Solicitud a depósito</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>
+      El técnico puede pedir items sin ver stock. Depósito y administrador visualizan y deciden cada solicitud.
+    </mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    @if (canCreateRequest()) {
+      <section class="ticket-inventory-request-section__composer">
+        <div class="ticket-inventory-request-section__composer-grid" [formGroup]="itemForm">
+          <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+            <mat-label>Item solicitado</mat-label>
+            <mat-select formControlName="inventoryItemId">
+              @for (item of inventoryOptions(); track item.id) {
+                <mat-option [value]="item.id" [disabled]="isDraftSelected(item.id)">{{ item.name }}</mat-option>
+              }
+            </mat-select>
+          </mat-form-field>
+
+          <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+            <mat-label>Cantidad</mat-label>

+          </button>

+

+          <div class="ticket-inventory-request-section__draft-list">

+      </section>
```

```diff
+<mat-card class="ticket-resolution-section">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>Comentario técnico</mat-card-title>
+    <mat-card-subtitle>
+      @if (canEdit()) {
+        Documentá lo realizado y el criterio técnico seguido para resolver o diagnosticar el problema.
+      } @else {
+        Registro técnico visible dentro del ticket. Solo el técnico asignado puede editarlo.
+      }
+    </mat-card-subtitle>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic" class="ticket-resolution-section__field">
+      <mat-label>Comentario de resolución</mat-label>
+      <textarea
+        matInput
+        rows="8"
+        [formControl]="commentControl"
+        [placeholder]="canEdit() ? 'Ej. Se midió tensión, se aisló la falla y se pidió reposición de insumo.' : 'No hay comentario técnico cargado todavía.'"
+      ></textarea>
+      <mat-hint>
+        @if (updatedAt()) {
+          Última actualización registrada en el mock.
+        } @else {
+          {{ canEdit() ? 'Se guarda automáticamente en el estado local del ticket.' : 'Aún no se registró una resolución técnica.' }}
+        }
+      </mat-hint>
+    </mat-form-field>
+  </mat-card-content>
+</mat-card>
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/ticket-resolution-section/ticket-resolution-section.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/ticket-resolution-section/ticket-resolution-section.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+import { effect, Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { takeUntilDestroyed } from '@angular/core/rxjs-interop';
+import { FormControl, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
+import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
+import { debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged } from 'rxjs';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-ticket-resolution-section',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatCardModule, MatFormFieldModule, MatInputModule, ReactiveFormsModule],
+  templateUrl: './ticket-resolution-section.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './ticket-resolution-section.component.scss'
+})
+export class TicketResolutionSectionComponent {
+  readonly comment = input('');
+  readonly updatedAt = input('');
+  readonly canEdit = input(false);
+  readonly commentChange = output<string>();
+  readonly commentControl = new FormControl('', { nonNullable: true });
+
+  constructor() {
+    effect(() => {
+      const nextComment = this.comment();
+
+      if (this.commentControl.value !== nextComment) {
+        this.commentControl.setValue(nextComment, { emitEvent: false });
+      }
+
+      if (this.canEdit()) {
+        this.commentControl.enable({ emitEvent: false });
+        return;
+      }
+
+      this.commentControl.disable({ emitEvent: false });
+    });
+
+    this.commentControl.valueChanges
+      .pipe(debounceTime(250), distinctUntilChanged(), takeUntilDestroyed())
+      .subscribe((value) => this.commentChange.emit(value));
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
+@if (ticketsPage$ | async; as ticketsPage) {
+  <section class="tickets-page">
+    <div class="tickets-page__header">
+      <app-page-title
+        eyebrow="Mesa operativa"
+        [title]="ticketsPage.pageTitle"
+        [subtitle]="ticketsPage.pageSubtitle"
+      />
+
+      <div class="tickets-page__actions">
+        <button mat-stroked-button type="button" class="tickets-page__action tickets-page__action--secondary">
+          <mat-icon>{{ ticketsPage.secondaryAction.icon }}</mat-icon>
+          <span>{{ ticketsPage.secondaryAction.label }}</span>
+        </button>
+
+        <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" class="tickets-page__action" (click)="openCreateTicketDialog()">
+          <mat-icon>{{ ticketsPage.primaryAction.icon }}</mat-icon>
+          <span>{{ ticketsPage.primaryAction.label }}</span>
+        </button>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+
+    <app-tickets-table [block]="ticketsPage.ticketsTable" />
+  </section>
+}
```

```diff
+.tickets-page {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.5rem;
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.tickets-page__header {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-end;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.tickets-page__actions {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  flex-shrink: 0;
+}
+
+.tickets-page__action {
+  min-height: 2.9rem;
+  padding-inline: 1rem;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.tickets-page__action mat-icon {
+  margin-right: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.tickets-page__action--secondary {
+  border-color: rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.12);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 900px) {
+  .tickets-page__header {
+    align-items: stretch;

+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
```

```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/tickets-page/tickets-page.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+import { AsyncPipe } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, inject } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatDialog, MatDialogModule } from '@angular/material/dialog';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+
+import { CreateTicketFormValue } from '../../../../core/models/create-ticket.model';
+import { MockTicketsService } from '../../../../core/services/mock-tickets.service';
+import { PageTitleComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/page-title/page-title.component';
+import { CreateTicketDialogComponent } from '../create-ticket-dialog/create-ticket-dialog.component';
+import { TicketsTableComponent } from '../tickets-table/tickets-table.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-tickets-page',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [AsyncPipe, MatButtonModule, MatDialogModule, MatIconModule, PageTitleComponent, TicketsTableComponent],
+  templateUrl: './tickets-page.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './tickets-page.component.scss'
+})
+export class TicketsPageComponent {
+  private readonly dialog = inject(MatDialog);
+  private readonly mockTicketsService = inject(MockTicketsService);
+
+  readonly ticketsPage$ = this.mockTicketsService.ticketsPage$;
+
+  openCreateTicketDialog(): void {
+    this.dialog
+      .open<CreateTicketDialogComponent, undefined, CreateTicketFormValue>(CreateTicketDialogComponent, {
+        autoFocus: false,
+        maxWidth: 'calc(100vw - 1.5rem)',
+        width: '58rem'
+      })
+      .afterClosed()
+      .subscribe((payload) => {
+        if (payload) {
+          console.log('Create ticket dialog result', payload);
+        }
+      });
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/tickets-table/tickets-table.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/tickets-table/tickets-table.component.ts
```
```diff
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+import { Component, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { RouterLink } from '@angular/router';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatTableModule } from '@angular/material/table';
+
+import { TicketsTableData } from '../../../../core/models/ticket.model';
+import { PriorityIndicatorComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/priority-indicator/priority-indicator.component';
+import { StatusBadgeComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/status-badge/status-badge.component';
+import { UserAvatarComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/user-avatar/user-avatar.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-tickets-table',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatButtonModule, MatCardModule, MatIconModule, MatTableModule, RouterLink, PriorityIndicatorComponent, StatusBadgeComponent, UserAvatarComponent],
+  templateUrl: './tickets-table.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './tickets-table.component.scss'
+})
+export class TicketsTableComponent {
+  readonly block = input.required<TicketsTableData>();
+
+  readonly displayedColumns: Array<'id' | 'title' | 'category' | 'affectedDevice' | 'status' | 'priority' | 'createdAt' | 'assignee'> = [
+    'id',
+    'title',
+    'category',
+    'affectedDevice',
+    'status',
+    'priority',
+    'createdAt',
+    'assignee'
+  ];
+
+  labelFor(column: (typeof this.displayedColumns)[number]): string {
+    return this.block().columns.find((item) => item.key === column)?.label ?? column;
+  }
+
+  hasAssignee(assigneeName?: string | null): boolean {
+    return Boolean(assigneeName);
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```
