#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/layout/components/sidebar-user-switcher/sidebar-user-switcher.component.html`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/layout/components/sidebar-user-switcher/sidebar-user-switcher.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+@if (viewModel$ | async; as viewModel) {
+  <button
+    type="button"
+    class="sidebar-user-switcher"
+    [matMenuTriggerFor]="usersMenu"
+    aria-label="Cambiar usuario activo"
+  >
+    <app-user-avatar [initials]="viewModel.activeUser.initials" [size]="44" />
+
+    <div class="sidebar-user-switcher__copy">
+      <p class="sidebar-user-switcher__name">{{ viewModel.activeUser.name }}</p>
+      <p class="sidebar-user-switcher__role">{{ viewModel.activeUser.roleLabel }}</p>
+    </div>
+
+    <mat-icon class="sidebar-user-switcher__icon">unfold_more</mat-icon>
+  </button>
+
+  <mat-menu #usersMenu="matMenu" xPosition="before" yPosition="above" class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-panel">
+    <div class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Seleccionar usuario activo">
+      @for (user of viewModel.users; track user.id) {
+        <button
+          mat-menu-item
+          type="button"
+          class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item"
+          [class.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item--active]="user.isActive"
+          (click)="setActiveUser(user.id)"
+        >
+          <app-user-avatar [initials]="user.initials" [size]="34" />
+
+          <span class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-copy">
+            <span class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-name">{{ user.name }}</span>
+            <span class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-role">{{ user.roleLabel }}</span>
+          </span>
+
+          @if (user.isActive) {
+            <mat-icon class="sidebar-user-switcher__menu-check">check</mat-icon>
+          }
+        </button>
+      }
+    </div>
+  </mat-menu>
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

@@ -0,0 +1,103 @@
+:host {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+  width: 100%;
+  padding: 0.95rem 0.4rem 0.2rem;
+  border: 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
+  background: transparent;
+  color: inherit;
+  text-align: left;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher:hover {
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__copy {
+  min-width: 0;
+  flex: 1;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__name,
+.sidebar-user-switcher__role,
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-name,
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-role {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__name {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__role {
+  margin-top: 0.2rem;
+  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.58);
+  font-size: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__icon {
+  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.72);
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.2rem;
+  padding: 0.35rem;
+  min-width: 19rem;
+  background: #17181b;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
+  gap: 0.85rem;
+  align-items: center;
+  min-height: 4rem;
+  border-radius: 0.95rem;
+  color: #f5f7fa;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item:hover,
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item.cdk-program-focused,
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item.cdk-keyboard-focused {
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-item--active {
+  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.92), rgba(104, 15, 15, 0.95));
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-copy {
+  display: grid;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-name {
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-role {
+  margin-top: 0.16rem;
+  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.72);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar-user-switcher__menu-check {
+  color: #ffffff;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 959px) {
+  .sidebar-user-switcher__menu {
+    min-width: 17rem;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+import { AsyncPipe } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, inject } from '@angular/core';
+import { combineLatest, map } from 'rxjs';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatMenuModule } from '@angular/material/menu';
+
+import { MockUserContextService } from '../../../core/services/mock-user-context.service';
+import { UserAvatarComponent } from '../../../shared/ui/user-avatar/user-avatar.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-sidebar-user-switcher',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [AsyncPipe, MatIconModule, MatMenuModule, UserAvatarComponent],
+  templateUrl: './sidebar-user-switcher.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './sidebar-user-switcher.component.scss'
+})
+export class SidebarUserSwitcherComponent {
+  private readonly mockUserContextService = inject(MockUserContextService);
+
+  readonly viewModel$ = combineLatest({
+    activeUser: this.mockUserContextService.activeUser(),
+    users: this.mockUserContextService.getUsers()
+  }).pipe(
+    map(({ activeUser, users }) => ({
+      activeUser,
+      users: users.map((user) => ({
+        ...user,
+        isActive: user.id === activeUser.id
+      }))
+    }))
+  );
+
+  setActiveUser(userId: number | string): void {
+    this.mockUserContextService.setActiveUser(userId);
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/services/location-link.service.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/services/location-link.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+import { isPlatformBrowser } from '@angular/common';
+import { inject, Injectable, PLATFORM_ID } from '@angular/core';
+
+import { AppLocation } from '../../core/models/location.model';
+
+@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
+export class LocationLinkService {
+  private readonly platformId = inject(PLATFORM_ID);
+
+  isValidLocation(location: AppLocation | null | undefined): location is AppLocation {
+    return Boolean(
+      location
+        && Number.isFinite(location.latitude)
+        && Number.isFinite(location.longitude)
+        && location.latitude >= -90
+        && location.latitude <= 90
+        && location.longitude >= -180
+        && location.longitude <= 180
+    );
+  }
+
+  buildGoogleMapsUrl(location: AppLocation | null | undefined): string | null {
+    if (!this.isValidLocation(location)) {
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    const coordinates = `${location.latitude},${location.longitude}`;
+    return `https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=${encodeURIComponent(coordinates)}`;
+  }
+
+  openInGoogleMaps(location: AppLocation | null | undefined): boolean {
+    const url = this.buildGoogleMapsUrl(location);
+
+    if (!url || !isPlatformBrowser(this.platformId)) {
+      return false;
+    }
+
+    window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer');
+    return true;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import { inject, Injectable } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
+
+import { LocationPickerDialogData, LocationSelectionResult } from '../../core/models/location.model';
+import { LocationPickerDialogComponent } from '../ui/location-picker-dialog/location-picker-dialog.component';
+
+@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
+export class LocationPickerService {
+  private readonly dialog = inject(MatDialog);
+
+  open(data: LocationPickerDialogData = {}) {
+    return this.dialog
+      .open<LocationPickerDialogComponent, LocationPickerDialogData, LocationSelectionResult>(LocationPickerDialogComponent, {
+        autoFocus: false,
+        maxWidth: 'calc(100vw - 1rem)',
+        width: '52rem',
+        data
+      })
+      .afterClosed();
+  }
+}

+@if (!hasValidLocation()) {
+  <section class="location-map__message">
+    <mat-icon>location_off</mat-icon>
+    <div>
+      <p class="location-map__message-title">Ubicación no disponible</p>
+      <p class="location-map__message-copy">No hay coordenadas válidas para mostrar en el mapa.</p>
+    </div>
+  </section>
+} @else {
+  <section class="location-map__shell">
+    <div #mapCanvas class="location-map__canvas" aria-label="Mapa de ubicación"></div>
+
+    @if (state() === 'loading' || state() === 'idle') {
+      <div class="location-map__overlay" aria-live="polite">
+        <mat-progress-spinner diameter="40" mode="indeterminate"></mat-progress-spinner>
+        <p>Cargando mapa...</p>
+      </div>
+    }
+
+    @if (state() === 'error') {
+      <div class="location-map__overlay location-map__overlay--error" aria-live="polite">
+        <mat-icon>warning</mat-icon>
+        <div>
+          <p class="location-map__message-title">No se pudo cargar el mapa</p>
+          <p class="location-map__message-copy">{{ errorMessage() }}</p>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    }
+  </section>
+}

+:host {

+}
+
+.location-map__shell,

+  position: relative;

+  background: rgba(244, 246, 248, 0.92);
+}

+}

+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  padding: 1.5rem;
+  text-align: center;
+  background: rgba(248, 249, 251, 0.92);
+  color: var(--text-secondary);

+.location-map__message-title,

+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+

+.location-map__message {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  align-items: start;
+}
+
+.location-map__overlay--error {
+  align-content: center;
+  justify-items: start;
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.location-map__message {
+  padding: 1.15rem 1.1rem;
+}
+

+.location-map__message mat-icon {
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+.location-map__message-copy {
+  margin-top: 0.3rem;
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  line-height: 1.55;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .location-map__canvas {
+    min-height: 18rem;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 560px) {
+  .location-map__overlay--error,
+  .location-map__message {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+}

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/ui/location-map/location-map.component.ts`
```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/ui/location-map/location-map.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,108 @@
+import { CommonModule, isPlatformBrowser } from '@angular/common';
+import { AfterViewInit, ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, ElementRef, OnDestroy, PLATFORM_ID, ViewChild, computed, inject, input, signal } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatProgressSpinnerModule } from '@angular/material/progress-spinner';
+import type { Map as LeafletMap } from 'leaflet';
+
+import { AppLocation } from '../../../core/models/location.model';
+import { LocationLinkService } from '../../services/location-link.service';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-location-map',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [CommonModule, MatIconModule, MatProgressSpinnerModule],
+  templateUrl: './location-map.component.html',
+  styleUrls: ['./location-map.component.scss'],
+  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+})
+export class LocationMapComponent implements AfterViewInit, OnDestroy {
+  private readonly platformId = inject(PLATFORM_ID);
+  private readonly locationLinkService = inject(LocationLinkService);
+
+  @ViewChild('mapCanvas') private mapCanvas?: ElementRef<HTMLElement>;
+
+  readonly location = input<AppLocation | null>(null);
+  readonly title = input('Ubicación');
+  readonly zoom = input(15);
+
+  readonly state = signal<'idle' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error' | 'invalid'>('idle');
+  readonly errorMessage = signal('');
+  readonly hasValidLocation = computed(() => this.locationLinkService.isValidLocation(this.location()));
+
+  private mapInstance: LeafletMap | null = null;
+
+  ngAfterViewInit(): void {
+    queueMicrotask(() => {
+      void this.initializeMap();
+    });
+  }
+
+  ngOnDestroy(): void {
+    this.mapInstance?.remove();
+    this.mapInstance = null;
+  }
+
+  private async initializeMap(): Promise<void> {
+    if (!isPlatformBrowser(this.platformId)) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const location = this.location();
+    if (!this.locationLinkService.isValidLocation(location)) {
+      this.state.set('invalid');
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const mapElement = this.mapCanvas?.nativeElement;
+    if (!mapElement) {
+      this.state.set('error');
+      this.errorMessage.set('No se pudo preparar el contenedor del mapa.');
+      return;
+    }
+
+    this.state.set('loading');
+
+    try {
+      const leaflet = await import('leaflet');
+      const coordinates: [number, number] = [location.latitude, location.longitude];
+
+      this.mapInstance = leaflet.map(mapElement, {
+        center: coordinates,
+        zoom: this.zoom(),
+        zoomControl: true
+      });
+
+      leaflet
+        .tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png',
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

    se sube una estructura de bdd casi definitiva

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/ui/location-picker-dialog/location-picker-dialog.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+<h2 mat-dialog-title>{{ data.title || 'Seleccionar ubicación' }}</h2>
+
+<mat-dialog-content class="location-picker-dialog">
+  <section class="location-picker-dialog__intro">
+    <div class="location-picker-dialog__intro-icon" aria-hidden="true">
+      <mat-icon>my_location</mat-icon>
+    </div>
+
+    <div>
+      <p class="location-picker-dialog__intro-title">Marcá el punto exacto en el mapa</p>
+      <p class="location-picker-dialog__intro-copy">
+        Hacé click sobre el mapa para ubicar el cliente. Esa selección se guarda como coordenadas y desde ahí se genera el enlace externo a Maps.
+      </p>
+    </div>
+  </section>
+
+  <section class="location-picker-dialog__summary">
+    <div>
+      <p class="location-picker-dialog__summary-label">Coordenadas seleccionadas</p>
+      <p class="location-picker-dialog__summary-value">{{ coordinatesLabel() }}</p>
+    </div>
+
+    @if (googleMapsUrl(); as googleMapsUrl) {
+      <button mat-stroked-button type="button" (click)="openSelectedLocationInMaps()">
+        <mat-icon>open_in_new</mat-icon>
+        <span>Ver punto en Maps</span>
+      </button>
+    }
+  </section>
+
+  <section class="location-picker-dialog__map-shell">
+    <div #mapCanvas class="location-picker-dialog__map" aria-label="Selector de ubicación"></div>
+
+    @if (state() === 'loading' || state() === 'idle') {
+      <div class="location-picker-dialog__overlay" aria-live="polite">
+        <mat-progress-spinner diameter="40" mode="indeterminate"></mat-progress-spinner>
+        <p>Cargando selector de ubicación...</p>
+      </div>
+    }
+
+    @if (state() === 'error') {
+      <div class="location-picker-dialog__overlay location-picker-dialog__overlay--error" aria-live="polite">
+        <mat-icon>warning</mat-icon>
+        <div>
+          <p class="location-picker-dialog__message-title">No se pudo cargar el mapa</p>
+          <p class="location-picker-dialog__message-copy">{{ errorMessage() }}</p>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    }
+  </section>
+</mat-dialog-content>
+
+<mat-dialog-actions align="end">
+  <button mat-button type="button" (click)="close()">Cancelar</button>
+  <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" [disabled]="!googleMapsUrl()" (click)="confirmSelection()">
+    Usar esta ubicación
+  </button>
+</mat-dialog-actions>
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
commit afc7fcc672f80bc23b5eafe1b40247082a7f7048
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Fri Apr 10 10:31:43 2026 -0300

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/shared/ui/location-picker-dialog/location-picker-dialog.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,130 @@
+:host {
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  min-width: min(48rem, calc(100vw - 3rem));
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro,
+.location-picker-dialog__summary {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  padding: 0.95rem 1rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1.25rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 248, 250, 0.94));
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-icon {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  width: 2.75rem;
+  height: 2.75rem;
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.08);
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-title,
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-copy,
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-label,
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-value,
+.location-picker-dialog__message-title,
+.location-picker-dialog__message-copy {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-title,
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-value {
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+  font-weight: 800;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-copy,
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-label,
+.location-picker-dialog__message-copy {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__intro-copy {
+  margin-top: 0.3rem;
+  line-height: 1.55;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-label {
+  font-size: 0.72rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__summary-value {
+  margin-top: 0.28rem;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__map-shell {
+  position: relative;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+  border-radius: 1.35rem;
+  background: rgba(244, 246, 248, 0.92);
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__map {
+  min-height: 28rem;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__overlay {
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  padding: 1.5rem;
+  text-align: center;
+  background: rgba(248, 249, 251, 0.92);
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__overlay p {
+  margin: 0;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__overlay--error {
+  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
+  align-content: center;
+  justify-items: start;
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.location-picker-dialog__overlay--error mat-icon {
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .location-picker-dialog {
+    min-width: auto;
+  }
+
+  .location-picker-dialog__intro,
+  .location-picker-dialog__summary {
+    align-items: stretch;
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .l
... (código truncado por longitud) ...

+import { CommonModule, isPlatformBrowser } from '@angular/common';
+import { AfterViewInit, ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, ElementRef, OnDestroy, PLATFORM_ID, ViewChild, computed, inject, signal } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA, MatDialogModule, MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatProgressSpinnerModule } from '@angular/material/progress-spinner';
+import type { CircleMarker, Map as LeafletMap } from 'leaflet';
+
+import { AppLocation, LocationPickerDialogData, LocationSelectionResult } from '../../../core/models/location.model';
+import { LocationLinkService } from '../../services/location-link.service';
+
+const DEFAULT_CENTER: AppLocation = {
+  latitude: -34.6037,
+  longitude: -58.3816,
+  addressLabel: 'Buenos Aires, Argentina'
+};
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-location-picker-dialog',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [CommonModule, MatButtonModule, MatDialogModule, MatIconModule, MatProgressSpinnerModule],
+  templateUrl: './location-picker-dialog.component.html',
+  styleUrls: ['./location-picker-dialog.component.scss'],
+  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+})
+export class LocationPickerDialogComponent implements AfterViewInit, OnDestroy {
+  private readonly dialogRef = inject(MatDialogRef<LocationPickerDialogComponent, LocationSelectionResult>);
+  private readonly locationLinkService = inject(LocationLinkService);
+  private readonly platformId = inject(PLATFORM_ID);
+  readonly data = inject<LocationPickerDialogData | null>(MAT_DIALOG_DATA, { optional: true }) ?? {};
+
+  @ViewChild('mapCanvas') private mapCanvas?: ElementRef<HTMLElement>;
+
+  readonly state = signal<'idle' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error'>('idle');
+  readonly errorMessage = signal('');
+  readonly selectedLocation = signal<AppLocation | null>(this.getInitialLocation());
+  readonly googleMapsUrl = computed(() => this.locationLinkService.buildGoogleMapsUrl(this.selectedLocation()));
+  readonly coordinatesLabel = computed(() => {
+    const location = this.selectedLocation();
+    if (!this.locationLinkService.isValidLocation(location)) {
+      return 'Todavía no marcaste un punto en el mapa.';
+    }
+
+    return `${location.latitude.toFixed(5)}, ${location.longitude.toFixed(5)}`;
+  });
+
+  private mapInstance: LeafletMap | null = null;
+  private markerInstance: CircleMarker | null = null;
+
+  ngAfterViewInit(): void {
+    queueMicrotask(() => {
+      void this.initializeMap();
+    });
+  }
+
+  ngOnDestroy(): void {
+    this
... (código truncado por longitud) ...

**Autor:** Valentino_Colella
**Fecha:** Mon Apr 6 17:54:32 2026 -0300
**Mensaje:** chore: bootstrap inicial del CRM con docs y frontend Angular mock

### Cambios por archivo:
#### 📄 `docs/diagrams/diagrama_de_entidades.puml`
```diff
commit a1c0054ba93c4ef90ad62ea5d7a6da5466a614ea
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 6 17:54:32 2026 -0300

    chore: bootstrap inicial del CRM con docs y frontend Angular mock
    
    - incorpora la base documental inicial del proyecto en docs, incluyendo
      diagrama de entidades PlantUML, schema base y archivos de ejemplo
      para relevamiento operativo
    - crea el frontend en Angular 21 standalone con Angular Material,
      theming propio, estructura SSR y configuración inicial de workspace
    - arma el shell principal del sistema con sidebar, topbar y layout
      responsive pensado para escritorio y mobile
    - implementa un dashboard inicial de referencia con tarjetas de estado,
      tabla de tickets recientes y timeline de actividad
    - incorpora modelos tipados, servicios reutilizables y consumo de JSON
      locales desde src/mocks para desacoplar la UI de cualquier backend
    - agrega el módulo inicial de tareas con listado, acciones principales,
      tabla responsive y navegación integrada en el sidebar
    - suma el diálogo inicial de "Crear tarea" con Angular Material Dialog,
      reactive forms, validaciones básicas y opciones cargadas desde mocks
    - ajusta el arranque local para exposición en red y compatibilidad con
      el entorno SSR configurado hasta esta etapa
    
    Importante:
    - todo lo implementado en Angular hasta este commit es un boceto inicial
      de frontend orientado a validar estructura, navegación y UX
    - no hay backend, persistencia, autenticación ni flujos productivos reales
    - todos los datos, estados, listados y formularios actuales son mock

+@startuml diagrama_de_entidades
+
+' Diagrama entidad-relacion base para arrancar.
+' Reemplaza nombres, atributos y relaciones segun tu dominio.
+
+hide circle
+skinparam linetype ortho
+skinparam shadowing false
+skinparam class {
+	BackgroundColor White
+	ArrowColor Black
+	BorderColor Black
+}
+
+title Diagrama de Entidades
+
+' =========================
+' Entidades principales
+' =========================
+
+entity "Cliente" as Cliente {
+    +razonSocial: string
+	+cuit: string
+	+email: string
+	+telefono: string
+	---
+	+registrarse()
+	+realizarPedido()
+}
+
+
+
+entity "Usuario" as Usuario {
+	+nombre: string
+	+email: string
+	+coontraseña: string
+	---
+	+registrarse()
+	+iniciarSesion()
+}
+
+entity "Rol" as Rol {
+	+nombre: string
+	---
+	+asignarPermisos()
+}
+
+entity "Productos" as Productos {
+	+codigo: string
+	+nombre: string
+	+marca: string
+	+serial: string
+	+categoria: string
+	---
+	+agregarProducto()
+	+eliminarProducto()
+}
+
+entity "Inventario" as Inventario {
+	+id_inventario: int
+	+cantidad: int
+	+codigo_producto: string
+	
+	---
+	+actualizarInventario()
+	+consultarInventario()
+}
+
+entity "Tareas" as Tareas {
+	+id_tarea: int
+	+titulo: string
+	+tipo: string
+	+

--- /dev/null

@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+# MicrotvCrmFrontend
+
+This project was generated using [Angular CLI](https://github.com/angular/angular-cli) version 21.2.6.
+
+## Development server
+
+To start a local development server, run:
+
+```bash
+ng serve
+```
+
+Once the server is running, open your browser and navigate to `http://localhost:4200/`. The application will automatically reload whenever you modify any of the source files.
+
+## Code scaffolding
+
+Angular CLI includes powerful code scaffolding tools. To generate a new component, run:
+
+```bash
+ng generate component component-name
+```
+
+For a complete list of available schematics (such as `components`, `directives`, or `pipes`), run:
+
+```bash
+ng generate --help
+```
+
+## Building
+
+To build the project run:
+
+```bash
+ng build
+```
+
+This will compile your project and store the build artifacts in the `dist/` directory. By default, the production build optimizes your application for performance and speed.
+
+## Running unit tests
+
+To execute unit tests with the [Vitest](https://vitest.dev/) test runner, use the following command:
+
+```bash
+ng test
+```
+
+## Running end-to-end tests
+
+For end-to-end (e2e) testing, run:
+
+```bash
+ng e2e
+```
+
+Angular CLI does not come w
... (código truncado por longitud) ...

Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 6 17:54:32 2026 -0300

    chore: bootstrap inicial del CRM con docs y frontend Angular mock
    
    - incorpora la base documental inicial del proyecto en docs, incluyendo
      diagrama de entidades PlantUML, schema base y archivos de ejemplo
      para relevamiento operativo
    - crea el frontend en Angular 21 standalone con Angular Material,
      theming propio, estructura SSR y configuración inicial de workspace
    - arma el shell principal del sistema con sidebar, topbar y layout
      responsive pensado para escritorio y mobile
    - implementa un dashboard inicial de referencia con tarjetas de estado,
      tabla de tickets recientes y timeline de actividad
    - incorpora modelos tipados, servicios reutilizables y consumo de JSON
      locales desde src/mocks para desacoplar la UI de cualquier backend
    - agrega el módulo inicial de tareas con listado, acciones principales,
      tabla responsive y navegación integrada en el sidebar
    - suma el diálogo inicial de "Crear tarea" con Angular Material Dialog,
      reactive forms, validaciones básicas y opciones cargadas desde mocks
    - ajusta el arranque local para exposición en red y compatibilidad con
      el entorno SSR configurado hasta esta etapa
    
    Importante:
    - todo lo implementado en Angular hasta este commit es un boceto inicial
      de frontend orientado a validar estructura, navegación y UX
    - no hay backend, persistencia, autenticación ni flujos productivos reales
    - todos los datos, estados, listados y formularios actuales son mock

--- /dev/null

+import { mergeApplicationConfig, ApplicationConfig } from '@angular/core';
+import { provideServerRendering, withRoutes } from '@angular/ssr';
+import { appConfig } from './app.config';
+import { serverRoutes } from './app.routes.server';
+
+const serverConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
+  providers: [
+    provideServerRendering(withRoutes(serverRoutes))
+  ]
+};
+
+export const config = mergeApplicationConfig(appConfig, serverConfig);
```

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+import { ApplicationConfig, provideBrowserGlobalErrorListeners } from '@angular/core';
+import { provideClientHydration, withEventReplay } from '@angular/platform-browser';
+import { provideRouter } from '@angular/router';
+
+import { routes } from './app.routes';
+
+export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
+  providers: [
+    provideBrowserGlobalErrorListeners(),
+    provideRouter(routes),
+    provideClientHydration(withEventReplay())
+  ]
+};
```

+import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
+
+import { DashboardPageComponent } from './features/dashboard/components/dashboard-page/dashboard-page.component';
+import { TasksPageComponent } from './features/tasks/components/tasks-page/tasks-page.component';
+import { AppShellComponent } from './layout/components/app-shell/app-shell.component';
+
+export const routes: Routes = [
+	{
+		path: '',
+		component: AppShellComponent,
+		children: [
+			{
+				path: '',
+				pathMatch: 'full',
+				component: DashboardPageComponent,
+				data: { title: 'Dashboard' }
+			},
+			{
+				path: 'tasks',
+				component: TasksPageComponent,
+				data: { title: 'Tareas' }
+			}
+		]
+	}
+];
```

+import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
+import { map, of, shareReplay, tap } from 'rxjs';
+
+import { ClientOption } from '../models/client.model';
+import { CreateTaskFormValue, TaskCreationMockData } from '../models/create-task.model';
+import { TaskTemplateOption } from '../models/task-template.model';
+import taskCreationData from '../../../mocks/task-creation-data.json';
+
+@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
+export class MockTaskCreationService {
+  readonly taskCreationData$ = of(taskCreationData as TaskCreationMockData).pipe(
+    shareReplay({ bufferSize: 1, refCount: false })
+  );
+
+  readonly clients$ = this.select((data) => data.clients);
+  readonly templates$ = this.select((data) => data.templates);
+
+  createTask(payload: CreateTaskFormValue) {
+    return of(payload).pipe(tap((value) => console.log('Create task mock payload', value)));
+  }
+
+  private select<T>(project: (data: TaskCreationMockData) => T) {
+    return this.taskCreationData$.pipe(map(project));
+  }
+}
+
+export type { ClientOption, CreateTaskFormValue, TaskCreationMockData, TaskTemplateOption };
\ No newline at end of file
```

+import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
+import { map, of, shareReplay } from 'rxjs';
+
+import { TaskListItem, TasksPageData, TasksTableData } from '../models/task.model';
+import tasksData from '../../../mocks/tasks-data.json';
+
+@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
+export class MockTasksService {
+  readonly tasksPage$ = of(tasksData as TasksPageData).pipe(
+    shareReplay({ bufferSize: 1, refCount: false })
+  );
+
+  readonly tasksTable$ = this.select((data) => data.tasksTable);
+  readonly pendingTasks$ = this.select((data) => data.tasksTable.items);
+
+  private select<T>(project: (data: TasksPageData) => T) {
+    return this.tasksPage$.pipe(map(project));
+  }
+}
+
+export type { TaskListItem, TasksPageData, TasksTableData };

+@if (dashboard$ | async; as dashboard) {
+  <section class="dashboard-page">
+    <app-page-title [title]="dashboard.pageTitle" [subtitle]="dashboard.pageSubtitle" />
+
+    <app-stats-cards [stats]="dashboard.stats" />
+
+    <div class="dashboard-page__grid">
+      <app-recent-tickets-table [block]="dashboard.recentTickets" />
+      <app-recent-activity-timeline [block]="dashboard.recentActivity" />
+    </div>
+  </section>
+}

--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/dashboard/components/dashboard-page/dashboard-page.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+.dashboard-page {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.5rem;
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.dashboard-page__grid {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.5rem;
+  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(20rem, 0.95fr);
+  align-items: start;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.dashboard-page > *,
+.dashboard-page__grid > * {
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 1180px) {
+  .dashboard-page__grid {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 640px) {
+  .dashboard-page {
+    gap: 1rem;
+  }
+
+  .dashboard-page__grid {
+    gap: 1rem;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file

+import { AsyncPipe } from '@angular/common';
+import { Component, inject } from '@angular/core';
+
+import { MockLayoutDataService } from '../../../../core/services/mock-layout-data.service';
+import { RecentActivityTimelineComponent } from '../recent-activity-timeline/recent-activity-timeline.component';
+import { RecentTicketsTableComponent } from '../recent-tickets-table/recent-tickets-table.component';
+import { StatsCardsComponent } from '../stats-cards/stats-cards.component';
+import { PageTitleComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/page-title/page-title.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-dashboard-page',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    AsyncPipe,
+    PageTitleComponent,
+    RecentActivityTimelineComponent,
+    RecentTicketsTableComponent,
+    StatsCardsComponent
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './dashboard-page.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './dashboard-page.component.scss'
+})
+export class DashboardPageComponent {
+  private readonly mockLayoutDataService = inject(MockLayoutDataService);
+
+  readonly dashboard$ = this.mockLayoutDataService.dashboard$;
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+<mat-card class="activity-timeline">
+  <mat-card-header>
+    <mat-card-title>{{ block().title }}</mat-card-title>
+  </mat-card-header>
+
+  <mat-card-content>
+    <ol class="activity-timeline__list">
+      @for (item of block().items; track item.timestamp + item.text) {
+        <li class="activity-timeline__item">
+          <span class="activity-timeline__marker" [class]="'activity-timeline__marker activity-timeline__marker--' + item.tone"></span>
+
+          <div class="activity-timeline__content">
+            <p class="activity-timeline__type">{{ item.type }}</p>
+            <p class="activity-timeline__text">{{ item.text }}</p>
+
+            <div class="activity-timeline__meta">
+              <span>{{ item.actor }}</span>
+              <span>{{ item.timestamp }}</span>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </li>
+      }
+    </ol>
+  </mat-card-content>
+</mat-card>
\ No newline at end of file
```

+<section class="stats-cards">
+  @for (stat of stats(); track stat.label) {
+    <mat-card class="stats-cards__card" [class]="'stats-cards__card stats-cards__card--' + stat.variant">
+      <mat-card-content>
+        <p class="stats-cards__label">{{ stat.label }}</p>
+        <p class="stats-cards__value">{{ stat.value }}</p>

+  }
+</section>

+.stats-cards {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1rem;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.06);
+  border-left-width: 6px;
+  border-radius: 1.4rem;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel);
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card mat-card-content {
+  padding: 1.25rem;
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card--danger {
+  border-left-color: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card--info {
+  border-left-color: var(--accent-blue);
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card--warning {
+  border-left-color: var(--accent-amber);
+}
+
+.stats-cards__card--success {
+  border-left-color: var(--accent-green);
+}
+
+.stats-cards__label,
+.stats-cards__value,
+.stats-cards__sublabel {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+

+  color: var(--text-secondary);

+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.stats-cards__value {
+  margin-top: 0.7rem;

+  font-weight: 800;
+  line-height: 1;
+}

+  margin-top: 0.7rem;
+  color: var(--

+import { Component, input } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';

+
+@Component({

+  imports: [MatCardModule],

+<h2 mat-dialog-title>Crear tarea</h2>
+
+<mat-dialog-content>
+  @if (taskCreationData$ | async; as taskCreationData) {
+    <form class="create-task-dialog__form" [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="submit()">
+      <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+        <mat-label>Título</mat-label>
+        <input matInput formControlName="title" placeholder="Ej. Revisión de instalación en sucursal" />
+        @if (form.controls.title.hasError('required') && form.controls.title.touched) {
+          <mat-error>El título es obligatorio.</mat-error>
+        }
+      </mat-form-field>
+
+      <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
+        <mat-label>Cliente</mat-label>
+        <mat-select formControlName="clientId">
+          @for (client of taskCreationData.clients; track client.id) {
+            <mat-option [value]="client.id">{{ client.name }}</mat-option>
+          }
+        </mat-select>
+        @if (form.controls.clientId.hasError('required') && form.controls.clientId.touched) {
+          <mat-error>Seleccioná un cliente.</mat-error>
+        }
+      </mat-form-field>
+
+      <mat

+@if (tasksPage$ | async; as tasksPage) {
+  <section class="tasks-page">
+    <div class="tasks-page__header">
+      <app-page-title
+        eyebrow="Operación diaria"
+        [title]="tasksPage.pageTitle"
+        [subtitle]="tasksPage.pageSubtitle"
+      />
+
+      <div class="tasks-page__actions">
+        <button mat-stroked-button type="button" class="tasks-page__action tasks-page__action--secondary">
+          <mat-icon>{{ tasksPage.secondaryAction.icon }}</mat-icon>
+          <span>{{ tasksPage.secondaryAction.label }}</span>
+        </button>
+
+        <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" class="tasks-page__action" (click)="openCreateTaskDialog()">
+          <mat-icon>{{ tasksPage.primaryAction.icon }}</mat-icon>
+          <span>{{ tasksPage.primaryAction.label }}</span>
+        </button>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+
+    <app-tasks-table [block]="tasksPage.tasksTable" />
+  </section>
+}
\ No newline at end of file

--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tasks/components/tasks-page/tasks-page.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,63 @@
+.tasks-page {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 1.5rem;
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.tasks-page__header {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-end;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 1rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-page__actions {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 0.75rem;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.tasks-page__action {
+  min-height: 2.9rem;
+  padding-inline: 1rem;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.tasks-page__action mat-icon {
+  margin-right: 0.45rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-page__action--secondary {
+  border-color: rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.12);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 900px) {
+  .tasks-page__header {
+    align-items: stretch;
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .tasks-page__actions {
+    justify-content: flex-start;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 640px) {
+  .tasks-page {
+    gap: 1rem;
+  }
+
+  .tasks-page__actions {
+    display: grid;
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .tasks-page__action {
+    justify-content: center;
+    width: 100%;
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

```diff
commit a1c0054ba93c4ef90ad62ea5d7a6da5466a614ea
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 6 17:54:32 2026 -0300

    chore: bootstrap inicial del CRM con docs y frontend Angular mock
    
    - incorpora la base documental inicial del proyecto en docs, incluyendo
      diagrama de entidades PlantUML, schema base y archivos de ejemplo
      para relevamiento operativo
    - crea el frontend en Angular 21 standalone con Angular Material,
      theming propio, estructura SSR y configuración inicial de workspace
    - arma el shell principal del sistema con sidebar, topbar y layout
      responsive pensado para escritorio y mobile
    - implementa un dashboard inicial de referencia con tarjetas de estado,
      tabla de tickets recientes y timeline de actividad
    - incorpora modelos tipados, servicios reutilizables y consumo de JSON
      locales desde src/mocks para desacoplar la UI de cualquier backend
    - agrega el módulo inicial de tareas con listado, acciones principales,
      tabla responsive y navegación integrada en el sidebar
    - suma el diálogo inicial de "Crear tarea" con Angular Material Dialog,
      reactive forms, validaciones básicas y opciones cargadas desde mocks
    - ajusta el arranque local para exposición en red y compatibilidad con
      el entorno SSR configurado hasta esta etapa
    
    Importante:
    - todo lo implementado en Angular hasta este commit es un boceto inicial
      de frontend orientado a validar estructura, navegación y UX
    - no hay backend, persistencia, autenticación ni flujos productivos reales
    - todos los datos, estados, listados y formularios actuales son mock

+.tasks-table {
+  min-width: 0;
+  border-radius: 1.6rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.06);
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel);
+}
+
+.tasks-table mat-card-header,
+.tasks-table mat-card-content {
+  padding-inline: 1.3rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-table mat-card-header {
+  padding-top: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__scroll {
+  max-width: 100%;
+  overflow-x: auto;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__table {
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 860px;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__title {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__subtasks {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.15rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__subtasks strong {
+  font-size: 0.95rem;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__subtasks span {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.tasks-table__assignee {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.7rem;
+  font-weight: 600;
+}
+
+.mdc-data-table__header-cell,
+.mdc-data-table__cell {
+  border-bottom-color: rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.08);
+}
+
+th.mat-mdc-header-cell {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.75rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+td.mat-mdc-cell {
+  color: var(--text-primary);
+}

+

+import { StatusBadgeComponent } from '../../../../shared/ui/status-badge/status-badge.component';

+  templateUrl: './tasks-table.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './tasks-table.component.scss'
+})
+export class TasksTableComponent {
+  readonly block = input.required<TasksTableData>();
+
+  readonly displayedColumns: Array<'id' | 'title' | 'client' | 'subtasks' | 'status' | 'assignedTo'> = [
+    'id',
+    'title',
+    'client',
+    'subtasks',
+    'status',
+    'assignedTo'
+  ];
+
+  labelFor(column: (typeof this.displayedColumns)[number]): string {
+    return this.block().columns.find((item) => item.key === column)?.label ?? column;
+  }
+

--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/layout/components/app-shell/app-shell.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+@if (layoutData$ | async; as layoutData) {
+  <mat-sidenav-container class="app-shell">
+    <mat-sidenav
+      #drawer
+      class="app-shell__sidenav"
+      [mode]="isCompact() ? 'over' : 'side'"
+      [opened]="!isCompact()"
+    >
+      <app-sidebar
+        [brand]="layoutData.brand"
+        [navigation]="layoutData.navigation"
+        [currentUser]="layoutData.currentUser"
+        (itemSelected)="closeIfCompact(drawer)"
+      />
+    </mat-sidenav>
+
+    <mat-sidenav-content class="app-shell__content">
+      <app-topbar
+        [title]="routeTitle()"
+        [showMenuButton]="isCompact()"
+        (menuToggle)="drawer.toggle()"
+      />
+
+      <main class="app-shell__main">
+        <router-outlet />
+      </main>
+    </mat-sidenav-content>
+  </mat-sidenav-container>
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

+:host {
+  display: block;
+  min-height: 100dvh;
+}
+
+.app-shell {
+  min-height: 100dvh;
+  background: transparent;
+}
+
+.app-shell__sidenav {
+  width: var(--shell-sidebar-width);
+  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.2), transparent 28%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, #121214 0%, #19191c 100%);
+  color: var(--text-inverse);
+}
+
+.app-shell__content {
+  min-height: 100dvh;
+  min-width: 0;
+}
+
+.app-shell__main {
+  width: 100%;
+  min-width: 0;
+  padding: 1.5rem;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 959px) {
+  .app-shell__main {
+    padding: 1rem;
+    overflow-x: clip;
+  }
+}

+<aside class="sidebar">
+  <section class="sidebar__brand">
+    <div class="sidebar__brand-mark">Y</div>
+    <div>
+      <p class="sidebar__brand-name">{{ brand().name }}</p>
+      <p class="sidebar__brand-subtitle">{{ brand().subtitle }}</p>
+    </div>
+  </section>
+
+  <mat-divider />
+
+  <nav class="sidebar__nav" aria-label="Sidebar navigation">
+    @for (section of navigation(); track section.section) {
+      <section class="sidebar__section">
+        <p class="sidebar__section-title">{{ section.section }}</p>
+
+        <div class="sidebar__items">
+          @for (item of section.items; track item.id) {
+            <button
+              type="button"
+              class="sidebar__item"
+              [class.sidebar__item--active]="!item.route && item.active"
+              [routerLink]="item.route ?? null"
+              routerLinkActive="sidebar__item--active"
+              [routerLinkActiveOptions]="{ exact: isExactRoute(item.route) }"
+              (click)="itemSelected.emit(item.id)"
+            >
+              <span class="sidebar__item-main">
+                <mat-icon>{{ item.icon }}</mat-icon>
+                <span>{{ item.label }}</s

+  height: 100%;
+}
+
+.sidebar {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  height: 100%;
+  padding: 1.25rem 1rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar__brand {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.9rem;
+  padding: 0 0.35rem 1rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar__brand-mark {
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  width: 2.8rem;
+  height: 2.8rem;
+  border-radius: 1rem;
+  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-red) 0%, #560505 100%);
+  color: var(--text-inverse);
+  font-size: 1.15rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  box-shadow: 0 14px 22px rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.3);
+}
+
+.sidebar__brand-name,
+.sidebar__brand-subtitle,
+.sidebar__section-title,
+.sidebar__footer-name,
+.sidebar__footer-role {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.sidebar__brand-name {
+  font-size: 1rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
+}
+
+.sidebar__brand-subtitle {
+  margin-top: 0.15rem;
+  color: rgba(245, 247, 250, 0.64);
+  font-size: 0.78rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar__nav {
+  flex: 1;
+  padding: 1.1rem 0.2rem;
+  overflow: auto;
+}
+
+.sidebar__section + .sidebar__section {
+  margin-top: 1.2rem;
+}
+
+.sidebar__section-title {
+  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
+  padding-inline: 0.
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/layout/components/sidebar/sidebar.component.ts`
```diff
commit a1c0054ba93c4ef90ad62ea5d7a6da5466a614ea
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 6 17:54:32 2026 -0300

    chore: bootstrap inicial del CRM con docs y frontend Angular mock
    
    - incorpora la base documental inicial del proyecto en docs, incluyendo
      diagrama de entidades PlantUML, schema base y archivos de ejemplo
      para relevamiento operativo
    - crea el frontend en Angular 21 standalone con Angular Material,
      theming propio, estructura SSR y configuración inicial de workspace
    - arma el shell principal del sistema con sidebar, topbar y layout
      responsive pensado para escritorio y mobile
    - implementa un dashboard inicial de referencia con tarjetas de estado,
      tabla de tickets recientes y timeline de actividad
    - incorpora modelos tipados, servicios reutilizables y consumo de JSON
      locales desde src/mocks para desacoplar la UI de cualquier backend
    - agrega el módulo inicial de tareas con listado, acciones principales,
      tabla responsive y navegación integrada en el sidebar
    - suma el diálogo inicial de "Crear tarea" con Angular Material Dialog,
      reactive forms, validaciones básicas y opciones cargadas desde mocks
    - ajusta el arranque local para exposición en red y compatibilidad con
      el entorno SSR configurado hasta esta etapa
    
    Importante:
    - todo lo implementado en Angular hasta este commit es un boceto inicial
      de frontend orientado a validar estructura, navegación y UX
    - no hay backend, persistencia, autenticación ni flujos productivos reales
    - todos los datos, estados, listados y formularios actuales son mock

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/layout/components/sidebar/sidebar.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+import { Component, input, output } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatDividerModule } from '@angular/material/divider';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router';
+
+import { CurrentUser, BrandInfo } from '../../../core/models/layout.model';
+import { NavigationSection } from '../../../core/models/navigation.model';
+import { UserAvatarComponent } from '../../../shared/ui/user-avatar/user-avatar.component';
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-sidebar',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [MatDividerModule, MatIconModule, RouterModule, UserAvatarComponent],
+  templateUrl: './sidebar.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './sidebar.component.scss'
+})
+export class SidebarComponent {
+  readonly brand = input.required<BrandInfo>();
+  readonly navigation = input.required<NavigationSection[]>();
+  readonly currentUser = input.required<CurrentUser>();
+  readonly itemSelected = output<string>();
+
+  isExactRoute(route?: string): boolean {
+    return route === '/';
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
```

+<mat-toolbar class="topbar">
+  <div class="topbar__leading">
+    @if (showMenuButton()) {
+      <button type="button" mat-icon-button (click)="menuToggle.emit()" aria-label="Abrir menú lateral">
+        <mat-icon>menu</mat-icon>
+      </button>
+    }
+
+    <div class="topbar__title-group">
+      <p class="topbar__eyebrow">Panel principal</p>
+      <h1 class="topbar__title">{{ title() }}</h1>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+
+  <div class="topbar__actions">
+    <button type="button" mat-icon-button class="topbar__icon-button topbar__icon-button--alert" aria-label="Notificaciones">
+      <mat-icon>notifications</mat-icon>
+    </button>
+
+    <button type="button" mat-icon-button class="topbar__icon-button" aria-label="Ayuda">
+      <mat-icon>help_outline</mat-icon>
+    </button>
+  </div>
+</mat-toolbar>
\ No newline at end of file
```

+.priority-indicator {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.5rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.priority-indicator__dot {
+  width: 0.65rem;
+  height: 0.65rem;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  background: var(--accent-slate);
+}
+
+.priority-indicator__dot--critical,
+.priority-indicator__dot--high {
+  background: var(--brand-red);
+}
+
+.priority-indicator__dot--medium {
+  background: var(--accent-amber);
+}
+
+.priority-indicator__dot--low {
+  background: var(--accent-green);
+}

+.status-badge {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  padding: 0.36rem 0.72rem;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  font-size: 0.78rem;

+

+  background: rgba(244, 183, 64, 0.18);
+  color: #9a6b09;
+}
+

--- /dev/null

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+import { BootstrapContext, bootstrapApplication } from '@angular/platform-browser';
+import { App } from './app/app';
+import { config } from './app/app.config.server';
+
+const bootstrap = (context: BootstrapContext) =>
+    bootstrapApplication(App, config, context);
+
+export default bootstrap;
```

    - suma el diálogo inicial de "Crear tarea" con Angular Material Dialog,
      reactive forms, validaciones básicas y opciones cargadas desde mocks
    - ajusta el arranque local para exposición en red y compatibilidad con
      el entorno SSR configurado hasta esta etapa
    
    Importante:
    - todo lo implementado en Angular hasta este commit es un boceto inicial
      de frontend orientado a validar estructura, navegación y UX
    - no hay backend, persistencia, autenticación ni flujos productivos reales
    - todos los datos, estados, listados y formularios actuales son mock

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+// Include theming for Angular Material with `mat.theme()`.
+// This Sass mixin will define CSS variables that are used for styling Angular Material
+// components according to the Material 3 design spec.
+// Learn more about theming and how to use it for your application's
+// custom components at https://material.angular.dev/guide/theming
+@use '@angular/material' as mat;
+
+html {
+  height: 100%;
+  @include mat.theme(
+    (
+      color: (
+        primary: mat.$red-palette,
+        tertiary: mat.$blue-palette,
+      ),
+      typography: Manrope,
+      density: 0,
+    )
+  );
+}
+
+body {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  background-color: var(--mat-sys-surface);
+  color: var(--mat-sys-on-surface);
+  font: var(--mat-sys-body-medium);
+  margin: 0;
+  height: 100%;
+}
```

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/server.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+import {
+  AngularNodeAppEngine,
+  createNodeRequestHandler,
+  isMainModule,
+  writeResponseToNodeResponse,
+} from '@angular/ssr/node';
+import express from 'express';
+import { join } from 'node:path';
+
+const browserDistFolder = join(import.meta.dirname, '../browser');
+
+const app = express();
+const angularApp = new AngularNodeAppEngine({
+  allowedHosts: ['*']
+});
+
+/**
+ * Example Express Rest API endpoints can be defined here.
+ * Uncomment and define endpoints as necessary.
+ *
+ * Example:
+ * ```ts
+ * app.get('/api/{*splat}', (req, res) => {
+ *   // Handle API request
+ * });
+ * ```
+ */
+
+/**
+ * Serve static files from /browser
+ */
+app.use(
+  express.static(browserDistFolder, {
+    maxAge: '1y',
+    index: false,
+    redirect: false,
+  }),
+);
+
+/**
+ * Handle all other requests by rendering the Angular application.
+ */
+app.use((req, res, next) => {
+  angularApp
+    .handle(req)
+    .then((response) =>
+      response ? writeResponseToNodeResponse(response, res) : next(),
+    )
+    .catch(next);
+});
+
+/**
+ * Start the server if this module is the main entry point, or it is ran via PM2.
+ * The server listens on the port defined by the `PORT` environment variable, or 
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```

+@import 'tailwindcss';
+
+:root {
+	--shell-sidebar-width: 288px;
+	--surface-base: #f4f5f7;
+	--surface-panel: #ffffff;
+	--surface-panel-strong: #151515;
+	--surface-panel-muted: #1f1f22;
+	--border-soft: #d7d9dd;
+	--border-strong: #28282c;
+	--text-primary: #17181a;
+	--text-secondary: #5f6672;
+	--text-inverse: #f5f7fa;
+	--brand-red: #b71c1c;
+	--brand-red-strong: #8f1111;
+	--brand-red-soft: #f9d7d7;
+	--accent-amber: #f4b740;
+	--accent-green: #2d8b57;
+	--accent-blue: #2563eb;
+	--accent-slate: #5f6672;
+	--shadow-panel: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 18, 24, 0.08);
+}
+
+* {
+	box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body {
+	height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+	margin: 0;
+	font-family: 'Manrope', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
+	background:
+		radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(183, 28, 28, 0.08), transparent 22%),
+		linear-gradient(180deg, #fafafb 0%, #eff1f4 100%);
+	color: var(--text-primary);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+	font: inherit;
+}
+
+.mat-mdc-icon-button {
+	color: inherit;
+}
+
+.mat-mdc-table {
+	background: transparent;
+}
```

-# microtv-crm-ycc
+# CRM YCC
 
+## Descripción general
 
+CRM interno para YCC orientado a centralizar y simplificar la gestión operativa de la empresa, desde el ingreso de dispositivos al depósito hasta su instalación en cliente y el seguimiento posterior.
 
-## Getting started
+El sistema busca cubrir el flujo completo de trabajo de manera clara, intuitiva y eficiente, evitando complejidad innecesaria y priorizando la usabilidad para personal de distintas áreas, incluyendo depósito, administración, soporte y técnicos de instalación.
 
-To make it easy for you to get started with GitLab, here's a list of recommended next steps.
+No se plantea como un CRM genérico ni como una plataforma sobrecargada de funcionalidades. Su objetivo es adaptarse a la operatoria real de YCC.
 
-Already a pro? Just edit this README.md and make it your own. Want to make it easy? [Use the template at the bottom](#editing-this-readme)!
+---
 
-## Add your files
+## Objetivo del proyecto
 
-* [Create](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#create-a-file) or [upload](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#upload-a-file) files
-* [Add files using the command line](https://docs.gitlab.com/topics/git/add_files/#add-files-to-a-git-repository) or push an existing Git repository with the following command:
+Construir una plataforma interna que permita:
 
-```
-cd existing_repo
-git remote add origin https://gitlab.ycc.com.ar/it-ycc/microtv-crm-ycc.git
-git branch -M main
-git push -uf origin main
-```
+- registrar y seguir el ciclo de vida completo de dispositivos, equipos e insumos
+- centralizar la información operativa en un solo sistema
+- mejorar la trazabilidad de movimientos, asignaciones e instalaciones
+- reducir errores manuales, pérdidas de contexto y uso de planillas dispersas
+- facilitar el trabajo diario de usuarios no especializados en sistemas
+- servir como base para una futura evolución hacia uso externo o móvil
 
-## Integrate with your tools
+---
 
-* [Set up project integrations](https://gitlab.ycc.com.ar/it-ycc/microtv-crm-ycc/-/settings/integrations)
+## Problemas que debe resolver
 
-## Collaborate with your team
+Actualmente, la operación de este tipo de flujo suele presentar uno o más de estos problemas:
 
-* [Invite team members and collaborators](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/members/)
-* [Create a new merge request](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/creating_merge_requests.html)

-* [Set auto-merge](https://docs.gitlab.com

+# microtv-crm-ycc
+
+
+
+## Getting started
+
+To make it easy for you to get started with GitLab, here's a list of recommended next steps.
+
+Already a pro? Just edit this README.md and make it your own. Want to make it easy? [Use the template at the bottom](#editing-this-readme)!
+
+## Add your files
+
+* [Create](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#create-a-file) or [upload](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/repository/web_editor.html#upload-a-file) files
+* [Add files using the command line](https://docs.gitlab.com/topics/git/add_files/#add-files-to-a-git-repository) or push an existing Git repository with the following command:
+
+```
+cd existing_repo
+git remote add origin https://gitlab.ycc.com.ar/it-ycc/microtv-crm-ycc.git
+git branch -M main
+git push -uf origin main
+```
+
+## Integrate with your tools
+
+* [Set up project integrations](https://gitlab.ycc.com.ar/it-ycc/microtv-crm-ycc/-/settings/integrations)
+
+## Collaborate with your team
+
+* [Invite team members and collaborators](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/members/)
+* [Create a new merge request](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/creating_merge_requests.html)
+* [Automatically close issues from merge requests](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/issues/managing_issues.html#closing-issues-automatically)
+* [Enable merge request approvals](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/project/merge_requests/approvals/)
+* [Set auto-merge](https://docs.gitlab.com/user/project/merge_requests/auto_merge/)
+
+## Test and Deploy
+
+Use the built-in continuous integration in GitLab.
+
+* [Get started with GitLab CI/CD](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/quick_start/)
+* [Analyze your code for known vulnerabilities with Static Application Security Testing (SAST)](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/application_security/sast/)
+* [Deploy to Kubernetes, Amazon EC2, or Amazon ECS using Auto Deploy](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/topics/autodevops/requirements.html)
+* [Use pull-based deployments for improved Kubernetes management](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/clusters/agent/)
+* [Set up protected environments](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/environments/protected_environments.html)
+
+***
+
+# Editing this README
+
+When you're ready to make this README your own, just edit this file and use the handy template below (or feel free to structure it however you want - this is just a starting point!). Thanks to [makeareadme.com](https://www.makeareadme.com/) for this template.
+
+## Suggestions for a good README
+
+Every project is different, so consider which of these sections apply to yours. The sections used in the template are suggestions for most open source projects. Also keep in mind that while a README can be too long and detaile
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
